path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 一、Respiratory distress syndrome (RDS) (Part 1)
content:
Risk factors:
The main risk factor is prematurity
Other factors including perinatal asphyxia, maternal diabetes, absence of labor, absence of prenatal steroid administration to the mother, male sex, and white race
Clinical signs:
Tachypnea (>60 bpm)
Grunting (to create positive pressure to prevent alveolar collapse)
Increased work of breathing (nasal flaring, retraction of respiratory muscle)
Cyanosis (due to inadequate oxygenation)
Pallor (due to respiratory acidosis), lethargy and eventually apnea
Radiographic features:
The classic radiographic findings of RDS include a reticulogranular (i.e., ground-glass) pattern and air bronchograms
Progression of changes
Grade 1: consists of a fine granularity with some air bronchograms visible (ground- glass pattern)
Grade 2: more apparent, distinct, and coarse granularity to the lung fields, with more extensive air bronchograms (air bronchograms)
Grade 3: increasing opacity, with decreasing air bronchograms and granularity, still visible heart borders (blurry heart borders)
Grade 4: diffuse bilateral opacification is present, with lack of apparent heart borders and loss of air bronchograms (white out lung)
Prevention and treatment of RDS
Prevention of prematurity or asphyxia
The administration of dexamethasone or betamethasone to women 24 hrs before delivery of fetuses at 24-34 weeks
Continuous positive airway pressure: prevent end-expiratory alveolar collapse, reduce the work of breathing, and better match ventilation to perfusion
Exogenous surfactant
Timing: prophylactic (≤15mins), early (≤2hrs), rescue (>2hrs)
Types of surfactants
給予 surfactant 之 indication 包含但不僅限於下列幾項
RDS (不限於早產兒)
FiO2 > 30-40% (健保給付規範: Noninvasive ventilation且FiO2 >30%)
Invasive ventilation
General management of RDS
Warmth by radiant warmer or incubator
Sepsis workup and empiric antibiotics (unless premature delivery for maternal indications with no risk factors for chorioamnionitis)
Hydration at approximately 60-80 mL/kg per day (avoid excessive fluid)
Nutrition at approximately (NPO if tachypnea or increased work of breathing)
O2 supplement, CPAP and MV prn
Keep PaO2 50-80mmHg, PaCO2 40-60mmHg, PH > 7.25
Surfactant therapy
Respiratory complications of RDS
Pulmonary interstitial emphysema (50%)
Pneumothorax (5-10%)
Pulmonary hemorrhage (3%)
Bronchopulmonary dysplasia: interrupted normal lung development compounded by lung inflammation
Methods of surfactant administration	(2020, 2025 增修)
以下為 Intubation 給予之步驟(Closed system)
準備 NG tube，請剪成和 ETT+呼吸管路轉接頭等長(附表)。
將 Survanta 均分為二，分兩次給予。(左邊 2ml/kg，右邊 2ml/kg) ; 若為Curosurf可視施打總量單次(確定ETT並沒有one lung)或分兩次給予。(左邊 1.25ml/kg，右邊 1.25ml/kg)
將病人側臥，NG 由呼吸器管路轉接頭末端之抽痰孔穿入，置於 ETT 內。
與第 3 步同時，請將原呼吸器設定改為 PTV mode或者SIMV with 100% PS mode，IP 請比原 IP 再加 2， RR 請加至 60 (或是手動Manual)，同時 Ti 請設為 0.5。
以約 30 秒的緩慢速度，打入「第一次」surfactant，若是使用Curosurf，請再將原空針 disconnect 後抽約1cc的空氣，再次打入，以將管壁上之Curosurf完全打入肺部；若是有rince則不需要此步驟。
Surfactant 完全打入後，請將 Ti 調回原設定，但請維持 IP 和 RR。

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 一、Respiratory distress syndrome (RDS) (Part 2)
content:
當沒有再看到 surfactant 從 ETT 冒出，且病人vital sign 逐漸穩定後，請換另一邊側臥，並重複第 3 ~ 6 步。
在完成兩側 surfactant 的給予之後，請躺平，且若自呼順暢、無明顯 apnea 時，請將 RR 調回原始設定數值。此時應只有 IP 仍高於原設定，其他呼吸器 setting 應已調回原始設定。
視情況接上 flow sensor (打完至少0.5-1h之後再接, 避免survanta湧出)，監測 tidal volume (正常目標值為 4 ~ 6 ml/kg) 並觀察其compliance 的變化，依此盡速調降 IP 至原本的設定或更低，以避免pneumothorax、pulmonary hemorrhage 等情形的發生。
以上步驟，若原始設定為 HFOV，且給完 surfactant 後仍無法在 conventional mode 下維持適當血氧而須繼續使用 HFOV，也請根據臨床表現、vital sign、CXR 和ABG，盡速調降 MAP。

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / F/U ABG 30 mins later and CXR 6 hrs later，2 小時內禁氣管內抽吸
content:
Repeat dose 的條件，原則上以 FiO2 仍大於 30 - 40%為原則，若 FiO2 已小於 30 - 40%但仍有嚴重喘凹、無法拔管或 CXR 仍為 RDS，請與主治醫師討論是否要給予 repeat dose。
Survanta 間隔 6 小時後可視情況再給予一個療程，48 小時內最多 4 次。
Curosurf 間隔 12 小時後可視情況再給予一個療程(重複劑量為100mg/kg)，最多 2 次。
Survanta與Curosurf兩藥物不得併用
各號數Endo+Adapter 深度對照表  (2025 增)
以下表格為台北院區NICU氣管內管加呼吸管路轉接頭長度的對照表，給予surfactant前請務必親自測量，確定實際深度！！

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / LISA (Less Invasive Surfactant Administration)(2020 增, 2025修)
content:
使用時機
符合給予 Surfactant 的時機
週數：GA ≧ 28 wks
GA >32wks 沒有證據證明能有效降低 BPD
FiO2 ≧ 0.3 時使用 (依 Surfactant 健保規定)
FiO2 ≧ 0.6 時則考慮插管優先 (因失敗機會高)
藥物使用劑量同傳統給予的方法
準備物品：NG tube (灰頭, 5Fr) x 1、針筒 (5ml) x 2、喉頭鏡/喉頭鏡握柄 x 1 set、Magill Forceps (鼻夾) x 1、抽吸器/ 抽吸管 (淺抽管) x 1 set、Syringe pump x 1、手套、無菌生理食鹽水、記號筆/ 宜拉膠（做記號用）、SpO2 & EKG monitor)
執行順序
維持 NIPPV or NCPAP 的使用，並放置 OG tube
將嬰兒放置於插管位置，並注意保暖
測量長度 (耳珠至人中+1cm)，並於 NG tube 上做記號（以第一個 side hole 做
起始點）
用生理食鹽水潤滑 NG tube
打開呼吸道，將喉頭鏡置入，向斜上提起，看到聲帶
將 NG tube 置入（可使用鼻夾或者直接放入），看著第二個 side hole 通過聲門，用手固定 NG tube ，將 NG tube 上的記號固定在嘴唇
將喉頭鏡移出口腔，並利用固定 NG tube 的手將嘴巴閉緊
將抽滿藥物的針筒接上 NG tube，緩慢給予藥物 10-15 分鐘 (也可用 syringe pump run) ，並同時反抽 OG tube，觀察是否有藥物溢出，如果有出現心跳<100bpm 或者 SpO2 <90%，暫停給予藥物，等待恢復後再繼續給予。
針筒內的藥物推完後，另抽１ml 的空氣，將管內殘留的藥物推入
移除 NG tube，並維持 NIPPV/NCPAP 使用

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 二、Transient Tachypnea of the Newborn (TTNB)
content:
Clinical features
Tachypnea, mild cyanosis with minimal retraction and rales
More common in babies delivered by C/S before the onset of labor pain due to delay reabsorption of lung fluid.
Benign course, usually resolved in 3~~5 days.
Cyanotic patients oxygenate well with minimal O2 supplements.
X-ray clear in 5~7 days
Risk factors:
C/S, precipitate labor, infant of diabetic mother, SGA, LGA, male gender
Treatment
O2 supplement
Severe form may need IPPV and high FiO2 for days

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 三、Meconium Aspiration Syndrome (MAS)
content:
Clinical features
Tachypnea, gasping respiration, rales and cyanosis
A disease of full term and especially postmature infants, rare in infants < 36 weeks
Sometimes development of the syndrome of PPHN
X-ray
Hyperinflation of the lungs, may be focal or generalized; evidence of air trapping
Irregular densities throughout lung fields.
Complications
HIE
Air leak
PPHN
Acute renal failure
Management
Correction of hypoxemia and acidosis
No longer recommend intubation and tracheal suctioning for non-vigorous newborns born through meconium-stained amniotic fluid.
Frequently postural drainage
Correct hypoglycemia and polycythemia
If FiO2 requirement > 0.4, CPAP is often helpful
Severe cases may need NIPPV or intubation
Treat complication
Surfactant: consider MAS lavage therapy in severe case
MAS is the respiratory complication of asphyxia (one of the post-asphyxial syndromes), other organ systems also require assessment (ie: brain, heart, renal function, GI… etc. )
Diluted Survanta Lavage therapy (2024修)
Indication: severe MAS, OI > 15-20
Oxygenation index (OI)= (MAP*FiO2/PaO2)*100
MAP, mean airway pressure (cmH2O) 看呼吸器; FiO2(%), PaO2(mmHg) 看 ABG
Marker of severity of hypoxemic respiratory failure in neonates, 常用來當作評估 嚴重MAS/PPHN是否要使用 ECMO 的指標
Timing: as soon as possible, 盡量在出生 6-12hr 內施行
Dosage = survanta 1 vial (8ml) diluted with NS to 20ml (濃度= phospholipid 10mg/ml)
步驟
On ETT, on UAC or Aline
20ml 稀釋過的survanta分成4份 5ml or 2份 10ml, 針筒接上跟ETT等長的OG
側躺, Disconnect ETT&ventilator, 快速把OG放進ETT並打入survanta
接上ventilator 約5-10 sec, 再快速把survanta 抽出來, suction過程中, 需要有一人持續按摩寶寶的胸部
重複此動作, 5ml左右肺部各兩次 or 10ml左右肺部各一次
過程中可能會血氧不穩定, keep SpO2 > 80%, stop if SpO2 <80% / bradycardia
Check ABG 30min later and CXR 6hrs later, 降ventilatr setting

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 四、Persistent Pulmonary Hypertension of Newborn (PPHN)
content:
Clinical features
Cyanosis and acidemia, minimal sign of respiratory distress
Marked variability in the PaO2
Similar to congenital heart disease
Diagnosis
History: high risk pregnancy, fetal distress, low Apgar score and meconium staining with or without aspiration
CXR: inconclusive, can be normal or similar to parenchymal disease
EKG is usually normal, but a hypoxic myocardium may induce development of ST and T wave change
Differential of TcPO2 above and below distribution of preductal artery supply only in 30%
of patients
PaO2 < 50 torr and PaCO2 not higher than 50 torr

Hyperoxia test: 使用 100% O2 10-15 min, If PaO2 < 150mmHg or ↑ < 20mmHg or SpO2 <90%, 代表可能是 PPHN or cyanotic CHD (若使用100%O2 血氧會變好, 比較像 pulmonary cause)
Hyperventilation test: PPV via mask ventilation with 100% O2 and 120 bpm
PaO2 > 150, SpO2 100% => PPHN
Diagnosed by echocardiography  Ref: Singh Y et al. 2021 Aug;48(3):595-618
Rt heart 比 Lt 大很多, RV hypertrophy / dilatation
Engorged RV 造成 IVS flattening, LV 呈現 D shape
用 TR pressure gradient or PDA shunt pressure 預測 PASP (pulmonary artery systolic pressure); PASP = TR PG + RA pressure (RAP 大約 5-10 mmHg)
R’t -> L’t or bidirectional shunt through PDA and/or PFO
PA acceleration time
IVC size and collapsibility
Treatment
Maintain adequate cardiac output
Correct acidosis
Mechanical ventilation:
Improve oxygenation: increase FiO2 to maintain PaO2 > 50mmHg
PaCO2 維持正常 range 即可，不應刻意 hyperventilation
HFOV
Other medications : Nitroglycerine, Nitroprusside, PGE1
Metabolic homeostasis: maintain Ht, prevent hypoglycemia, hypocalcemia
Treat underlying diseases: RDS, MAS, Sepsis…
Pulmonary vasodilation
Primacor (milrinone): beware of hypotension
Inhaled nitric oxide (iNO) gas : usually start from 20 ppm
Magnesium sulfate : (1 amp = 10% 20ml ) (2021 修)
比較古早的文獻有使用MgSO4在PPHN，近期的實證文獻尚不足
Dose : loading : 200mg/kg IV over 20 ~ 30 min; Maintenance: 20 ~150 mg/kg/hr IV
BW(kg)×50mg dilute in D5W or D10W, max. 100mg/ml
Side effect : hypotension, respiratory depression, decreased muscle tone, signs of hypocalcemia
Viagra® (Sildenafil), 20mg/1# (2020 增修)
泡水濃度 2.5mg/ml ( in dis. water, 冰存 10 天)
(Ref. ROQUE, Fátima et al. Braz. J. Pharm. Sci. [online]. 2013, vol.49, n.2, pp.381-388.)
目前院內有 3 種品項(2020.06)
27251 Sildenafil 20mg/tab 自費 264 元/tab，最少一次買 1 顆
27224 Sildenafil 50mg/tab (口溶錠) 自費 210 元/tab，最少一次買 4 顆
27221 Sildenafil 100mg/tab 自費 400 元/tab，最少一次買 4 顆
1-2 mg/kg/dose po q6h (Baquero, 2006)
A wide range of doses has been reported (Ref. Pediatric dosage handbook, 16th edition, p.644)
Initial: 0.3mg/kg/dose every 8-12 hours;
doses of 0.25-1mg/kg/dose every 6-12 hours have been used
Note: Individual doses of 0.3mg/kg/dose given only one time have been used in select patients to facilitate weaning from iNO (Atz,1999)
2020 TPMMH NICU 使用經驗:
Dosing titration: (Q3D)
To effect reductions in pulmonary vascular resistance and arterial pressure
0.5mg/kg/dose q8h→1mg/kg/dose q8h→1mg/kg/dose q6h →1.5mg/kg/dose q6h
→2mg/kg/dose q6h (Ref. Wardle AJ et al. Archives of Disease in Childhood 2013;98:613-617.)
Monitor Blood pressure (side effect: hypotension)

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 五、Pulmonary Air Leak
content:
Clinical features
Most common : pneumomediastinum, pulmonary interstitial emphysema (PIE), pneumothorax, pneumopericardium and pneumoperitoneum
Presents with sudden deterioration of patients’ condition: cyanosis, bradycardia, tachypnea, retraction, grunting and flaring, shifting of apical impulse, sudden onset of abdominal distention.
Transillumination test: (+) 胸壁照光會像燈籠一樣暈開
Lung echo: increased clarity of A-lines, loss of B-lines, loss of lung sliding
Hypoxemia or only PCO2 retention
Treatment
If asymptomatic and small: no treatment.
Symptomatic pneumothorax or pneumothorax with extensive parenchymal disease:
single chest tapping first (#CHESTTAP)
戴無菌手套三消-> 鋪洞巾
使用蝴蝶針在 2nd intercostal space in mid-clavicular line 肋骨上緣入針
需有另一人協助反抽, 轉3-way打掉air, 記錄抽吸的air總量(ml)
consider decompression with a pig-tail 6 Fr. (< 1000gm) or 8 Fr. ( > 1000gm) if persisted
On pigtail / chest tube (#PIGTAIL), On chest tube前一定要先給Fentanyl 止痛!
Prepare: 戴無菌手套三消-> 鋪洞巾-> 鋼針放入 pigtail 撐直鎖緊
18# IC接空針筒在 4-5th intercostal space in ant-axillary line 沿著肋骨上緣入針
反抽確定有 air 後推軟針退硬針
guidewire經由軟針放入後退軟針
放dilator, 置放前可用 11#尖刀劃開皮膚
退dilator, 放 Pigtail, 進入肋膜後約 1cm 退鋼針, 或可先用 x-ray 量測 pigtail 深度
接空針反抽確認有 air, 最後固定 with low pressure 5 – 10 cm H2O
Pneumomediastinum only rarely requires evacuation even when air dissects into neck
Pneumopericardium requires immediate evaluation
Pneumoperitoneum : must know if the air from a ruptured abdomen or is a pulmonary complication. The later cause not necessarily require operative intervention.

Severe pulmonary hemorrhage may represent as pinkish foamy fluid noted in endotracheal
tube, esp. in PDA patients
Treatment
VLBW 初期肺出血給 Bosmin：將 0.1 ml bosmin (1:1000) 以N/S dilute to 10ml，
即 1: 100,000 後，以 0.3-0.5 ml/kg/dose 給予 (類似 survanta 給法，但請快速 push，
且打的過程中不需額外調整呼吸器設定，請參考 RDS 章節)
嚴重時可給予 Survanta：勿給 Curosurf，給法同 RDS (請參考 RDS 章節)
Should treat the underlying cause: ex: PDA needs ligation, etc.
(Ref: Barnes, ME, Feeney, E, Duncan, A, et al. Pulmonary haemorrhage in neonates: Systematic review of management. Acta Paediatr. 2022; 111: 236– 244. https://doi.org/10.1111/apa.16127)
後期肺出血或大小孩可參考 ENT李國森主任大小神水 (快速鍵:  GODWATER)
大神水 for bleeding，如肺出血, 使用時不論體重，NICU/PICU皆用 0.3 ml/dose打進endo
2% Xylocaine : 1/1000 Bosmin (原汁) = 3:1 （例: 2% Xylocaine 3cc + Bosmin 1cc）
小神水 for spasm，如支氣管攣縮, 使用時不論體重，NI/PICU皆用 0.3-0.5 ml/dose打進endo
2% Xylocaine : 1/1000 Bosmin (原汁) = 200:1 （例: 2%Xylocaine 20cc + Bosmin 0.1cc）

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 七、Apnea of prematurity(AOP)
content:
醫囑上方工具列 >> SDM >> 早產新生兒有呼吸暫停的現象該為孩子選擇茶鹼或咖啡因治療?
(ELBW infant 可在住院初期先給家屬簽屬 SDM, 才能及時使用)
Clinical feature
Prolonged periods without respiratory efforts (>20 sec) or 10~20 sec with cyanosis or/and bradycardia.
Most often idiopathic (primary) apnea of prematurity but one should rule out secondary apnea with underlying diseases (ie sepsis, IVH, ….etc)
Management
Respiratory monitoring
Diagnosis and treatment of underlying condition
Respiratory support: NCPAP, NIPPV
Medications: Caffeine citrate (Peyona) or Aminophylline/ Theophylline
Mechanisms of Action: smooth muscle dilatation, improvement of diaphragmatic
contractility, central respiratory stimulation, mild diuretic effects
Indications : apnea of prematurity or ventilator weaning
Aminophylline: theophylline = 0.8 : 1
Monitoring and evaluation
Apneic spells occurring in infants at or near term are always abnormal.
All infants <GA 35wk should be monitored for apnea for at least the first week of life. (Apneic spells generally begin at 1 or 2 days of life; if they do not occur during the first 7 days, they are unlikely to occur later)
Monitoring should continue until no apneic episode for at least 5 days.
Consider GER in xanthine resistant apnea
Aminophylline is generally discontinued at 34 to 36 weeks’ PCA if no apneic spells occur for 5-7 days.
Serum level monitor (aminophylline): on day 4 of therapy, not routine
Peak level: 1h after IV dose or 2h after an oral dose
Trough level: 30 min before the next dos

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 八、Neonatal Chylothorax (2024修)
content:
Approach of pleural effusion - Thoracentesis
Check pleural fluid routine, culture, TG/protein/LDH
Check serum TG/total protein, albumin/LDH
Suspect neonatal chylothorax：
P/F: WBC > 1000/ml, >80% Lymphocyte, Protein > 20 g/L
P/F: TG > 110 mg/dl (還沒feeding時可能正常)
蘇丹 III 染色為陽性, 細菌培養為陰性
且在餵食之前的肋膜液為清澈的淺黃色，餵食之後肋膜液則呈牛奶狀
胸部 X 光：在 X 光的表現為泛白色陰影，可見於單或雙側
胸部超音波：偵側肋膜積液
淋巴循環攝影
電腦斷層(CT scan)或核磁共振(MRI)：有助於乳糜胸的診斷
Management of congenital chylothorax
Octreotide (商品名: Sandostatin) (2021 修)

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 一、連續性氣道正壓 Continuous positive airway pressure, CPAP
content:
以 4 ~ 8 cmH2O 維持呼吸道的正壓
Types of CPAP pressure generators
Bubble CPAP: 以水氣震盪作為壓力來源, 可促進 surfactant 分泌
Ventilator generated (conventional) CPAP
Variable flow CPAP
High-flow nasal cannula
Effects
Increases transpulmonary pressure and functional residual capacity
Prevents alveolar collapse and decreases intrapulmonary shunt
Increases compliance
Conserves surfactant
Increases airway diameter and splints the airway
Splints the diaphragm
適應症
當患者使用 FiO2 > 40%時，SpO2 仍不達標準(或 PaO2 仍小於 50mmHg)
反覆性的呼吸暫停(apnea)
極低體重早產兒要停用呼吸器的過渡時期，可增加拔管成功的機率
Diseases with low FRC, eg: RDS, TTNB, CPIP, PDA, pulmonary edema
MAS
Airway closure disease, eg:bronchiolitis, BPD
Tracheomalacia
Paralysis of diaphragm
Complications of CPAP
Pneumothorax (<2%): usually in the acute phase
Abdominal distension: Benign, usually in chronic phase
Nasal obstruction
Nasal septal erosion or necrosis
Infection
Heated, humidified high-flow delivered by nasal cannula (HHHFNC = HFNC)
研究顯示在 post extubation 使用時，效果與 CPAP 相當，但可大幅降低 nasal injury
機率，但 primary respiratory support 之效果未有定論。
調整：Flow 控制 pressure: 4-8 L/min，每次調升調降 0.5-1 L/min
若 FiO2 >30%以上，先調降 FiO2 再調降 flow
建議使用在> 28 weeks 小孩,成功率較高
High flow nasal cannula 會產生 continuous distending pressure (有類似 CPAP 的效果)。
公式：CDP = 2.6 + 0.8*Flow - 1.4*BW (因影響因素太多，並不通用)

NIPPV=Nasal intermittent positive pressure ventilation
NIMV=Nasal intermittent mandatory ventilation
provides the benefits of CPAP with the addition of positive pressure breaths without the presence of an endotracheal tube
Clinical Evidence
As a primary respiratory support of RDS
More effectively than NCPAP in reducing the frequency of apneas and the incidence of extubation failure (elective or after failed CPAP)
Ventilator Setting
尖峰吸氣壓力 PIP：維持適當胸廓起伏，通常是 15~20 cmH2O (需看實際打的 pressure 而非設定值)，若漏氣厲害可考慮提高設定至 > 20 cmH2O。
呼氣末正壓 PEEP： 4 ~ 8 cmH2O
呼吸速率 Rate：維持 PaCO2 於 40~60 mmHg，通常開始時用每分鐘 20 ~ 40 下
吸氣時間 Ti：0.4-0.5 秒，可略長於 MV 時之設定值。
氣體流量 Flow：enough to reach PIP, usually 8-10L/min or higher
氧氣濃度 FiO2：維持適當 SpO2 (如早產兒在 91-95%) (或 PaO2 50 ~ 80 mmHg)
Weaning: same as conventional IMV
Complications: same as CPAP

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 三、傳統機械式呼吸治療 IMV or CMV
content:
Time triggered, Time Cycle, Pressure Limited, Intermittent Mandatory Ventilation
缺點
Pressure Limited ：tidal volumes 不穩定，易造成 volutrauma 或 atelectrauma。
易產生 “Plateau” pressure 高原性壓力而造成 barotrauma
病人與呼吸器不協同 Patient / Ventilator Asynchrony
缺乏連續性潮氣容積及肺動力學監視，要靠經驗目視或臨床檢查，且非連續性
適應症
當使用 CPAP or NIMV 時仍有明顯的胸部凹陷或仍經常發生呼吸暫停
使用 FiO2 > 30%仍然不能維持適當 SpO2 (或 PaO2 在 50mmHg 以上)
PaCO2 高於 65mmHg
難治的代謝性酸中毒
心臟血管功能嚴重障礙
神經肌肉疾病，嚴重影響呼吸
Harmful Effects of Mechanical Ventilation
Cardiovascular effects: Decrease of venous return and cardiac output, “Tamponade” of heart, Interference with pulmonary blood flow
Acute lung injury
Uneven ventilation, V/Q mismatch
Acid-base imbalance
Cerebral vascular effects
Complication of endotracheal intubation
呼吸器設定：傳統技巧、呼吸率 40~100 次/分、高頻率正壓法
傳統呼吸器設定技巧
如果臨床可行的話，可使用 flow sensor 觀測 tidal volume 以做為調整依據。
尖峰吸氣壓力 PIP：以最低壓力能維持適當 tidal volume (4-6ml/kg) 為原則，若無flow sensor 則以胸廓起伏和 SpO2 為主，早產兒通常是 15~20 cmH2O，足月兒可大於 20。
設定後應以 tidal volume、聽診、胸廓起伏並依據 Sp O2 及 ABG 為調整參考，不應只以週數和出生體重當設定依據。大略參考依據如：
BW<1000g ＝＞PIP 14-15 cmH2O
BW<1500g ＝＞PIP 15-16 cmH2O
BW<2000g ＝＞PIP 16-18 cmH2O
BW>2000g ＝＞PIP 18-20 cmH2O or more
呼氣末正壓 PEEP：維持氣道防止塌陷又避免過度充氣，4 ~ 6 cmH2O。
呼吸速率 Rate：維持 PaCO2 於 40 ~ 60 mmHg，通常開始時用每分鐘 20 ~ 40 下，應避免病兒吃力呼吸勞累。
吸氣時間 Ti：早產兒在急性期應使用較短 Ti 0.3-0.4 秒，應避免> 0.5 秒，在慢性肺病、
MAS、足月兒可考慮較長 Ti > 0.5 秒。
氣體流量 Flow：(BW+5) L/min, 一般設定為 6 L/min。
氧氣濃度 FiO2：以最低能維持適當 SpO2 (如早產兒 91-95%) (或 PaO2 50~80 mmHg )。
2. 呼吸率 40~100 次/分
對於有劇烈呼吸動作的病兒，若其呼吸與呼吸器呼吸不能協調一致時，在使用過傳統式或高頻率正壓呼吸法還不能改善時，可以嘗試。
調整法是次數與病兒自發性呼吸次數同步，吸氣時間縮短或吸氣/呼氣為 1：1 之比。
3. 高頻率正壓法(High Frequency Positive Pressure Ventilation)
適用時機
使用傳統式呼吸治療，已使用 FiO2 100% 但 PaO2 仍小於 50 mmHg
必須使用吸氣正壓 30 cmH2O 以上，才能看到胸廓起伏
使用呼吸率 40 次/分、PaCO2 仍高於 70 mmHg
呼吸器設定需縮短 Ti 及降低 PEEP 至 0 cmH2O
設定
1) 呼吸速率 60-100 次/分
呼吸器設定需縮短 Ti 及降低 PEEP
PIP 則相同或稍微降低

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 四、Patient-triggered ventilation (PTV) 病人驅動換氣模式
content:
當病人吸氣時，若氣流 or 壓力超過設定閾值(trigger threshold, flow trigger or pressure trigger)，就會同步引發呼吸器給予機械式通氣壓力
常用模式：
A/C (Assist-control ventilation)
(SLE5000: PTV mode, Servo-i: PC mode, VN500: PC/AC mode)
病人每一次呼吸都會驅動呼吸器輔助機械式壓力(Assist)
每一下換氣 PIP 固定、Ti 固定、呼吸次數配合病人自呼而無 Rate 設定僅有backup 設定(只
在呼吸暫停或速率過低時才會控制給予)
SIMV (Synchronized IMV)
使用者可設定呼吸速率來引發呼吸器同步給予此速率之機械式換氣壓力
每一下換氣 PIP 固定、Ti 固定、僅會給予設定的 Rate 次數
SIMV+PS (Synchronized IMV + Pressure support)
在設定的呼吸次數以外，若病人有自呼，則給予輔助的壓力
PS 之設定，在 SLE 為%數，Servo-i 及 VN-500 為 pressure above PEEP
使用時若有 flow sensor：
基本會有 Rate 設定次數的 PIP 設定值的換氣、每次的 Ti 固定、
另外在設定 Rate 以外若偵測到自呼、則會給予 PS 設定值的換氣、而這些 PS 部分的 Ti 則是配合病人吸吐氣時間
使用時如果沒有接上 flow sensor：
基本會有 Rate 設定次數的 PIP 設定值的換氣、每次的 Ti 固定、
另外在設定 Rate 以外若偵測到自呼、則會給予 PS 設定值的換氣、Ti 固定
PSV (Pressure support ventilation)
病人每次自發性呼吸時給予輔助的機械式壓力來幫忙減低呼吸功
理想上應可達到最好的patient ventilator synchrony
使用時需有 flow sensor，若無則實際上等同 A/C mode
每一下換氣 PIP 固定、Ti 配合病人吸吐氣時間、僅呼吸次數配合病人自呼而僅有 backup 設定 (只在呼吸暫停或速率過低時才會控制給予)
在早產兒常有 Ti 極短之情況
使用步驟
選取模式: A/C(PTV), SIMV, SIMV+PS, PSV
測試及設定驅動靈敏度trigger sensitivity (早產兒 flow trigger 時通常為 0.2-0.6)
隨時監測是否有”無效的同步”發生，如 Auto-cycling 自動引發:常見原因-管路積水震動、氣管內管漏氣、設定驅動靈敏度太低、打嗝等
呼吸器設定
Trigger：
Neurally adjusted ventilatory assist (NAVA)、Pressure trigger 及 Flow trigger
NAVA 直接偵測神經電位，被認為是最為準確的trigger 方式
NAVA 目前僅有搭配 Servo 系列機種，且在易 apnea 之族群較無幫助
目前認為病人使用 Pressure trigger 比起 Flow trigger 會有較大的呼吸作功；也就是說採用後者可以讓病人呼吸比較省力，且似乎可以更準確的 trigger
PIP：使用最低 PIP 來達到預期的潮氣容積Tidal volume (4-6ml/kg)，不應單以出生體重或
週數來當設定依據
PS 設定
傳統上會說 PIP 壓力減 PEEP 壓力的 30-50%、通常起始於 10-12 cm H2O
SLE 機型以%數呈現，通常起始 80-90%、最低不低於 50%，且設為 100%且無使用flow sensor，則視同 PTV mode
PEEP：維持氣道防止塌陷又避免過度充氣，一般為 4-8 cmH2O (起始設定 5-6)
吸氣時間(Ti)：短的吸氣時間 0.3-0.4 秒，避免過長 Ti ( > 0.5 秒)
呼吸速率 RR：依據 PCO2，但請參考病人自呼次數，例如 A/C mode 時若病人自呼 80 下但
backup rate 設定為 30 下，則此時調降 RR 毫無意義。
氧氣濃度 FiO2：利用最低氧氣濃度來維持適當的血氧濃度。
氣流 Flow：在現行呼吸器機種下無須設定。

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 五、Volume targeted ventilation (VTV)	(2020 增修)
content:
新的研究顯示，比起 barotrauma，volutrauma 和 atelectrauma 更容易造成新生兒肺部傷害，所以現行主流的呼吸治療皆著重討論如何避免 volutrauma 和 atelectrauma
VTV 就是在 Patient-triggered ventilation 的架構下，加上了目標潮氣容積(targeted tidal volume)的概念，以期能達成穩定的tidal volume 以及 minute ventilation，減少volutrauma 並維持更穩定的 PCO2 level。
實際運作原理為，在設定的 PIP 上限之內，呼吸器自動調控每次的實際 PIP，穩定的控制 tidal volume 在所設定的target tidal volume，理論上可以使用最低的 PIP 來達成理想的 tidal volume。
可搭配任一 Patient-triggered ventilation 的 mode 合用，與不同 mode 合用時的臨床效果差異仍未有定論，無明顯優劣之分。
在 SLE 5000 為 + TTV、SLE 6000 為 + VTV、Drager VN500 為 + VG
設定方法：
大原則同 Patient-triggered ventilation
PIP：
無固定 PIP，PIP 之設定為 PIP max，建議設定為原始 PIP + 5 cmH2O，或實際可達到目標tidal volume 的 PIP + 2~3 cmH2O
Target tidal volume：
早產兒急性期：4~6 ml/kg，再根據臨床狀況做調整
BPD 慢性期：5~8 ml/kg or more

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 六、調降及調升呼吸器設定
content:
盡量一次調降一項設定後觀察變化，且要觀察病人，不要調了就跑！
與 O2 相關：FiO2, Mean airway pressure (MAP), FiO2 ↑, PIP ↑, PEEP ↑, RR ↑ => O2 ↑
與 CO2 相關：minute ventilation (MV) =  tidal volume * RR
PIP ↑, PEEP ↓, PS ↑, RR ↑ => CO2 ↓
若 PIP 或 PS 設定值過低時，亦有可能因病人無法得到適當呼吸支持而產生極度快速的呼吸次數且極度費力的呼吸動作，則反而可能使 CO2 降低。
同時應注意呼吸次數及 Ti, Te，避免造成 IE reverse。
IMV (CMV)
PIP：每次可調降或調升 1-2 cmH2O。
PEEP：每次可調降或調升 1 cmH2O，最低 3 cmH2O，最高不超過 8 cmH2O。
Rate：每次可調降或調升 2-5 下/min。
FiO2：每次可調降或調升 5-10%。
Patient-triggered ventilation (PTV): 調整的大原則同 IMV
A/C：主要是調降 PIP，若自呼次數多時調降設定呼吸速率毫無意義。
SIMV：傳統上認為調降設定呼吸速率或調低 trigger sensitivity 可訓練病人自發性呼吸，可作為拔管前的訓練，但現在已不是主流做法。
SIMV+PS:
PS 設定：SLE 5000 以原本 PIP 壓力之%來設定，機器設定每次調升調降以 5%為一單位； Servo-i 則以pressure above PEEP 來設定(PS = 設定壓力+PEEP)
SLE：若 primary support 使用，以 80%上下來做初始設定，每次可調升調降 5-10%。
Servo：為 primary respiratory support 使用，起始總加 PS (設定壓力+PEEP)設定可為 10 cmH2O，每次可調升調降 1-2 cmH2O。
先調整 SIMV 設定或 PS 設定?? 哪個高就先降哪個！
PIP, FiO2：若設定過高或較低，以先調降或調升原本 SIMV 設定優先。
同時需檢視設定rate 及病人能被監測到trigger 的呼吸次數，若 trigger 呼吸次數遠大於設定rate，此時調降rate 毫無意義，建議優先調降 PS。
若已使用較低 PS，則逐步調降 SIMV rate 並可盡速準備拔管。

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 七、脫離呼吸器及拔除氣管內管條件
content:
當呼吸器設定調降至 Rate < 20 次/分、PIP < 15 cmH2O、FiO2 < 30%時，仍可維持適當SpO2 且 ABG PaO2 在 50~80 mmHg、PaCO2 在 40 ~ 60 mmHg 之間
病人穩定無頻繁 apnea
長期插管病人預拔管前後可使用 Dexamathasone 以增加拔管成功機率使用方法：0.25 mg/kg/dose q8h x 3 doses, 拔前 2 doses, 拔後 1 dose
Range: 0.25mg~1 mg/kg/dose for 1-3 doses; Max dose: 1 mg/kg/day
Note: A longer duration of therapy may be needed with more severe cases
Traumatic intubation：若體重＞1800g，拔管時會診 ENT
懷疑因 laryngomalacia 等 airway problems 無法拔管時，拔管時亦須會診 ENT
插管超過 7 天，拔管前可塗 Bosmin
病人已 On ETT 但情況突惡化及血氧無法維持要考慮DOPE
Displacement：氣管內管滑脫或位置不對, 聽診或以喉頭葉挑開來看
Obstruction：氣管內管阻塞, 抽痰或拔除氣管內管然後重 on
Pneumothorax：危急時直接 chest tapping，聽診/ translumination test / echo / x-ray 診斷
Equipment：設備沒接好, 呼吸器異常或管路脫落等

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 八、Neurally Adjusted Ventilatory Assist (NAVA)設定技巧及注意事項 (2021 增) (Part 1)
content:
Introduction:
使用 Edi catheter (NG/OG) 放置到 gastroesophageal junction, 偵測病人本身橫膈膜的電位變化 (electrical diaphragmatic activity, Edi) 得知每一下呼吸的 trigger-on and cycle-off , 並加以和呼吸器同步要給予的通氣
Equipment: Servo ventilator (機型: Servo-i、Servo-u、Servo-n)、Edi module、Edi catheter
Setup Process
Select Edi catheter、Position the Edi catheter
同樣尺寸，長度越長代表電極後端長度越長
> 2500 g:  use 8 Fr 100cm or 50cm
1500~2500 g: use 6 Fr 50cm
< 1500 g: use 6 Fr 49cm
測量鼻樑→耳垂→劍突的距離 (NEX)。
沾蒸餾水潤濕後放置適當的深度(不可使用Jelly潤濕)，可當OG/NG灌食，理論上5天要更換一條新的。
目前廠商捐增給早產兒基金會的Edi catheter是屬於Funnel connector type，灌食後不可反折、關閉。
Verify the Edi catheter position
透過面板操作確認Edi catheter位置，
正確應在編號2和3處，波形會變藍色。
Edi catheter 做微幅調整直到位置正確
編號1和2兩條波形變色，需外拉
編號3和4兩條波形變色，需內推
Set initial NAVA level
Typical NAVA level range: 0.5-3.0 cmH2O/uV
Edi peak: maximum voltage the diaphragm nerve signal; 反應呼吸做功
Invasive 5-15 uV        Noninvasive 5-20 uV
Edi min: the tone of diaphragm at rest; normal < 3 uV
方法1: 起初，on ETT 者NAVA level 設 1.0 cmH2O/uV，未on ETT 者設 0.5 cmH2O/uV，之後依照 Edi level，以及看相對應之tidal volume，決定NAVA level的調整，每次調整NAVA level 0.1-0.2 cmH2O/uV來達到目標。
方法2: 選擇呼吸器面板上〝Neural Access〞menu，進入〝NAVA preview〞，設定NAVA level目標為〝讓NAVA設定下預測的壓力曲線，略低於PC mode下的壓力曲線〞。
理想的NAVA level就是找到 breakpoint (因人、因時而異)，讓呼吸肌在合適的做功下達到良好的通氣和氧合。右圖呈現 NAVA level從 0.1-3 cmH2O/uV，從NAVA level 0.1-1 cmH2O/uV，呼吸做功維持、Edi peak差不多，而PIP有明顯上升；從NAVA level 1-3 cmH2O/uV，PIP不再增加，呼吸做功減少、Edi明顯下降。Breakpoint又可稱為〝point of optimal respiratory muscle unloading〞。新生兒呼吸變化大，比較不容易找到breakpoint。
If Edi peak is < 5 uV consistently(呼吸做功少 = 輕鬆), decreased the NAVA level.
If Edi peak is > 20 uV consistently(呼吸做功多 = 費力), increased the NAVA level.
If Edi min is > 3 uV consistently, it can indicate the baby is trying to generate PEEP itself and needs more PEEP.
Set NAVA level at zero. When the infant is breathing spontaneously, only NCPAP is delivered.
Select and set NAVA mode
Trigger: 0.5 uV; sensitivity: 1-2
Edi和Flow trigger同時並存，誰先出現就以誰為主
Set alarm limits
Apnea time: 2-3 sec. 開始，超過apnea time則呼吸器轉PC mode
If desaturation & periods of apnea are worsening, apnea time may need to be ↓ to < 2 sec.
If back up ventilation is too high, infants will not be encouraged to breathe spontaneously.
Weaning from NAVA
Weaning from Invasive-NAVA:
Decrease the NAVA level as the patient’s pulmonary status improves. Usually, the patient is ready to be extubated when the NAVA level is < 0.5 – 1 cmH2O/uV. Edi signal can be used as a guide for the success of extubation.
Weaning from NIV-NAVA: 
Once the NAVA is < 0.5 cmH2O/uV, FiO2 < 0.25 ~ 0.3, and Edi peak <15 uV and Edi min < 3 uV, infant can be transferred to NCPAP/high flow therapy.
Contraindication
Insufficient/absent respiratory effort (brain anomaly, medication)
Structure anomaly (esophageal atresia, severe diaphragmatic hernia)
Phrenic nerve injury
Congenital myopathy
MRI scanning (remember to remove and reserve Edi catheter before entering MRI area)
Hiccup 暫時先不用
體重小於800克，Edi訊號較不易偵測 (relative contraindication)
Differences between conventional and NAVA ventilation

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 八、Neurally Adjusted Ventilatory Assist (NAVA)設定技巧及注意事項 (2021 增) (Part 2)
content:
Ref. Royal Hospital for Women, Neonatal Service Division – Local Operating Procedures
Clinical benefit of NAVA
改善同步性: 利用Edi訊號，使呼吸器和病人的同步性得到保障
獨特的監測: Edi waveform和相關參數可以做為其他呼吸模式下的有力間測工具
保護肺策略與減少併發症: 依病人的通氣需求決定支持水平，避免過度支持或通氣不足
脫離呼吸器和拔管的決定指標: 病情好轉時，Edi訊號的降低導致呼吸器支持水平的降低
增加病人舒適度: 人機同步性減少病人的不適感與fighting問題

path: Respiratory / Respiratory System / 九、HFOV 設定技巧及注意事項
content:
HFOV 原理不同，不應單純將其視為傳統 mode 失敗後的更高階呼吸器設定。
Indication
Severe respiratory failure (無法維持適當 SpO2, PaO2 或 PaCO2 retention)
Air leak syndrome
Pulmonary hypertension
TE fistula
Potential advantage of HFOV
Small alveolar pressure swings: the risk of barotrauma is small
Respiratory fluctuation of BP and ICP is small
Active inspiration and expiration
Easy monitoring of MAP
Independent control of PaO2 and PaCO2
Potential problems on HFOV
Heating and humidification
Necrotizing tracheobronchitis
Gas trapping - IVH
Hypotension - Bradycardia
Pulmonary hemorrhage
HFOV 設定技巧
原則
O2：MAP (Mean airway pressure), FiO2
CO2：delta-P (amplitude) (數字越大 CO2 排除效果越好) or Frequency (Hz)(數字越大 CO2
排除效果越差)
CXR: keep right diaphragm T9-10 左右
使用後 30 分鐘，check ABG and CXR
Initial setting：
Frequency：Preterm <1500gm: 13-15 Hz, Term or CLD 8-13 Hz
MAP : 依臨床使用 indication
Hypercapnic respiratory failure：initial CMV/SIMV 時的 MAP(注意是 MAP 不是 PIP) + 0-2 cmH2O 開始，MAP 請看呼吸器面板。
Hypoxic Respiratory failure：通常比 initial CMV/SIMV 時的 MAP 高
2-5 cmH2O 開始，每次可嘗試調升或調降 1~2cmH2O to keep target SpO2 or PaO2，並follow CXR 以調整 MAP (right diaphragm around 9-10th rib)，避免 lung over-expansion 甚至 pneumothorax。
Air leak syndrome: 要和initial CMV/SIMV 時的MAP ㄧ樣或低 0-2 cmH2O。
delta-P (Amplitude)：調至 chest well 有適當 vibration，震到肚子不要震到四肢，ㄧ般由20 cmH2O 開始，之後視PaCO2 調整，每次可增加 2-5cmH2O。
FiO2 : as initial IMV
I:E = 1:1 fixed：不建議調整 I:E
Weaning
For oxygenation：若 MAP 太高就先降 MAP，每次漸降 1-2cmH2O，若 MAP 適當則先降 FiO2 ，每次可降 2~5%，至 40~60%時，再漸降 MAP 1~2 cmH2O 至 10cmH2O 最低至 6~8cmH2O。
delta-P 每次可調降 2~3
可由高頻呼吸器轉至傳統呼吸器或拔管：MAP 降至 < 10 cmH2O，FiO2 < 40%，病人有好的自發性呼吸 (非必要達成條件)
並沒有一定要改回 conventional mode 後再拔管。
使用 HFOV 時護理照顧應注意之事項
觀察患者之振動狀況
Vital sign 的檢測：聽診時將機器調至 standby，NBP 請測量下肢。
患兒保持頭部抬高 30’
加溫加濕回路中保持有水滴狀態，但是呼氣回路中有積水時，MAP or amplitude 則呈不安定狀態，要注意排水，一般溫度維持在 36.0~38.0’C
照 CXR 時無須停止 HFOV
Suction
胸壁振幅減少或 PaCO2 上升時，可能需要 suction
盡量不要 disconnect 的方式抽痰，以免 loss of lung volume
剛出生初用 HFOV 時前 48 小時盡量少抽痰，前 24 小時不換姿勢，24~48 小時可換姿勢，但不 disconnect tube，換姿勢時病人要呈一直線，不要扭到脖子
其他病人在使用 HFOV 後一小時內，可能會有很多痰跑出來；此時要抽痰
一般振動良好時較少有自發性呼吸，若有自發性呼吸時要考慮 delta P 不夠、airway 有分泌物、有 air leak 等。

起始劑量之使用：20 ppm
**若 20ppm 無反應，調高 NO 劑量效果也不好，但有時會用到 40 ppm (無實證)
NO 吸入療法期間之 NO 劑量調整及呼吸器設定之調整：
依 NO 吸入療法是否有效：(對照右上圖 Positive responder)
當 NO 濃度 20 ppm 使用 30 分鐘無反應時，若無反應則直接停止 iNO
(若超過 1 小時需照 weaning protocol 停止 iNO)
當使用 NO 反應良好時：若使用 NO 濃度 20 ppm 有效時，先維持該劑量
呼吸器設定之調降：維持 MAP 於安全範圍，勿過高。
若 MAP 過高，先調降 MAP 至安全範圍，再調降 FiO2。
調降 FiO2，除非 PaO2 超高否則不宜過快調降，每次調降 2-5%
若 FiO2 ≤ 60%則可進入 iNO weaning protocol
注意 vital signs。
若 NO＞20 ppm：
使用 NO 8 小時後檢測 Methemoglobin(CBC 盒，1 ㏄血液)。
使用 NO 24 小時後檢測bleeding time。
若 NO≤20 ppm 可不必檢測Methemoglobin 及 bleeding time。

path: Respiratory / NO / 二、脫離 NO 吸入療法
content:
條件：須 Fi O2 ≤ 60%且 HFOV 之 MAP ≤ 12 cmH2O 或 IMV 之 MAP ≤ 10 cmH2O
可調降 NO 時機：SpO2 一直 ≥ 95%，PaO2 > 60mmHg，Preductal 和 Postductal SpO2 差
< 5%，最快可每隔 30 分鐘調降 NO 5 ppm
若 SpO2 一直 ≥ 95%，則每隔 30 分鐘調降 NO 5 ppm 至其濃度為 5 ppm 後，若可再往下調則每 1 - 2 小時調降 1 ppm 至無法調降為止，然後維持此劑量 2-3 小時後終止NO。
當 NO 吸入療法終止後 5 分鐘內，SpO2 下降 10% 則將 NO 濃度恢復至終止前劑量。
需注意 #weaning failure criteria：調降 NO 濃度過程中，若 SpO2 下降 5% 或 FiO2 上升 20% 或 preductal and postductal 之 SpO2 差 10%以上或 Oxygen Index＞10，則將NO 濃度恢復至前次之 NO 濃度，並維持 4 小時暫不調降。
Oxygen Index ＝ MAP × FiO2(%) ×100/PaO2。維持變性血紅素(MetHb)＜5%。

VA ECMO – (Veno-Arterial)：A cannula is placed into both an artery (right carotid artery) and a
vein (right jugular vein), providing support for both the heart and lungs.
VV ECMO – (Veno-Venous)：A double-lumen cannula (12-16Fr) is placed into the vein, providing support for the lungs only.
Newborn 因血管大小的限制主要以 VA ECMO 為主 (最小的 ECMO cannula available: 6 French)

Primary diagnoses associated with primary pulmonary hypertension of the newborn (PPHN)
Idiopathic PPHN
Meconium aspiration syndrome
Respiratory distress syndrome
Group B streptococcal sepsis
Asphyxia
Congenital diaphragmatic hernia (CDH)

Gestational Age > 34 weeks.
Birth Weight > 2,000 grams.
No significant coagulopathy or uncontrollable bleeding * Heparin
No major intracranial hemorrhage
Mechanical ventilation < 10-14 days & Reversible lung injury
Prolonged exposure to high concentrations of oxygen and positive pressure ventilation à bronchopulmonary dysplasia (BPD). Pulmonary recovery following this injury takes weeks to months to occur
No lethal malformations
No major cardiac malformation
Failure of optimal medical management.

path: Respiratory / NO / 四、Eligibility Criteria for Neonatal Respiratory ECMO
content: ANY of the following AND underlying disease process which is likely to be reversible

Standard criteria:
OI ≥ 40 on conventional ventilation
OI ≥ 50-60 for HFOV
PaO2 < 40mmHg for >2 hours or PaO2 < 50-60mmHg for 2-12 hours
Despite maximal ventilator support

pH <7.25 due to metabolic acidosis
Raised lactate >5 mmol/L (45mg/dl)
Intractable hypotension
★考慮置放 ECMO 時機 (當呼吸器設定以達極限，仍無法支持病人心肺功能時)
FiO2 : 100%, PIP > 35 cm H2O, PaO2 < 50 mmHg
OI > 30 on conventional ventilation
OI > 40 on HFOV
Failure to improve with HFOV over 2-12 hours

CXR
CBC and DC
PT, INR, aPTT, Fibrinogen
Electrolyte
BUN/Cr, GOT/GPT
Brain echo
Cardiac echo
Crossmat

新生兒通常做頸部切開術，靜脈導管由右側頸靜脈伸入至右心
房將血引流出至體外。動脈導管由右側頸動脈伸入至主動脈與無名動脈交接處，將體外已交換氣體之血液送至全身X 光片顯示正確導管位置

血液幫浦（離心式）：相當於人工心臟
氧合器：相當於人工肺臟
氣體混合器，可調整：
FiO2：調氧氣濃度表可增加氧氣
Gas Flow：排除二氧化碳調此 (Gas flow 越高，
二氧化碳排除越多)
光譜計：
可監測氧合器後的血氧飽合度 SaO2：可監測氧合器的氧合功能，代表氧合器把缺氧血變成含氧血的能力。
氧合器前的血氧飽合度SvO2，代表病人的混合靜脈血氧飽合度，反應病人氧氣供應和消耗的平衡狀態。一般在血液中經組織利用消耗掉的氧氣 VO2，約為血
氧輸送 DO2 的 1/5。偏高或偏低都為異常。 SvO2 偏低，表示組織耗氧量增加(例如:敗血症，發炎反應)；若 SvO2 偏高，表示組織用氧能力降低(如 post CPR condition, cell dying，即將死亡的病人等)。
血色素 Hct 一般維持 30~35%，血色素太低，攜氧能力不足；血色素太高，增加血栓形成的危險，亦增加溶血的發生率。
壓力偵測：(目前 NI 較無使用)
幫浦前壓力(Pre-Pump Pressure)：測量由靜脈引流出血液的負壓，負壓勿超過-30mmHg。負壓變大，表示靜脈血引流不良，且負壓過高易造成溶血。
氧合器前壓力(Pre-Oxygenator Pressure)：測量幫浦後氧合器之前的管路壓力，正壓不可太高，一般超過 200mmHg 就須注意。壓力過高可能有氧合器內血栓形成現象，或動脈導管阻塞。壓力過高也易造成溶血。
氧合器後壓力(Post-Oxygenator Pressure)：動脈端管路和導管之阻力。
氧合器前後壓力差，可偵測氧合器內血栓之形成。
ACT(Activated Clotting Time)：凝血時間係測定血液離開血管後在體外凝固所須的時間。ACT 維持在 180~220 秒，(ACT 正常值的 1.5 倍, 正常值是 90~120 秒)，有嚴重出血傾向可視醫囑維持在 140~160 秒。
Free Hemoglobin 游離血紅素：
正常血漿中血紅素大部份與球蛋白結合，僅有微量之游離血紅素。此檢查可判斷紅血球被破壞程度。若>30mg/dL 或有嚴重的尿液潛血反應，須考慮更換 ECMO 系統。
本院機器單位為g/dL，因此 Free Hb>0.03g/dL 為換管標準

path: Respiratory / NO / 血流速下降，管路抖動：[流速:100~150ml/kg]
content:
若同樣的轉速而血流速下降，直接與值班技術員連絡，通知資深住院醫師或主治醫師。
首先檢查管路是否有扭折，先處理。
ECMO blood flow 不好，有兩個可能：
Venous drain 不好或intravascular volume 不足
Arterial tube connector thrombosis 或 outlet obstruction
如果 flow meter 閃動厲害，venous tube 抖動，則 venous drain 不好的可能性高。反之，flow meter 不會閃動，venous drain 不會抖動，blood flow 卻逐漸下降或突然掉到零，絕大可能是arterial outlet obstruction, 請找心外醫師。
Blood flow 不穩，管線抖動厲害：靜脈導管吸不到血，可能是靜脈導管位置不佳、血容量不足。
Volume 不夠：check CVP level，作心超，補volume。
Active bleeding：找出血位置，想辦法止血。
Tamponade 或 internal bleeding
Blood flow 穩定，管線不會抖動，血流下降甚至突然沒有血流
動脈導管塞住，需緊急更換導管及整套系統
可能原因：
抗凝血不足，形成血栓。
短時間大量輸入血小板、新鮮冷凍血漿。
出血：(快速評估: 粉紅尿)
血小板＜60,000/mm3，要輸血小板，可維持血小板數在更高的範圍，及短暫停止抗凝血劑使 用。待出血危險減少時，便恢復抗凝血劑使用。至於血栓及栓塞則是出血相對的併發症，抗凝血劑使用不夠，這些問題更易出現。
若傷口仍持續的出血，須聯絡技術員及心臟外科醫師，重新評估傷口及作適度的縫合。
溶血
常見原因
靜脈血引流不良，造成離心式幫浦前負壓過大，引起溶血。
離心式幫浦軸心處產生血栓，造成幫浦轉動不良或血栓在幫浦內轉動，直接破壞紅血球造成
溶血。
處理原則
給 Mannitol 或 Lasix 利尿，並以 NaHCO3 鹼化尿液，以保護腎臟。
監測 Free Hb，若>30mg/dL，須更換 ECMO 系統。
氧合器血漿滲漏
常見原因
脂質類藥物(Intralipids / Propofol…)會 coating 在氧合器的膜上，易造成氧合器血漿滲漏，應避免使用。
高膽紅素血症病人，因血中表面張力較高，也易有血漿滲漏現象。
若開始有血漿滲漏現象，應墊尿布或看護墊計算血漿流失量。若氧合器的 SaO2 可維持>95%， 可先觀察，若流失量較多可補充血品。血漿滲漏嚴重，或氧合器功能變差(SaO2 下降)，應更換氧合器。
心肌震暈(Myocardial Stunning)
原因不明，臨床上可見窄的脈搏壓甚至消失，此時心臟的輸出量全靠 ECMO。
可能原因：
缺血再灌流傷害。
動脈導管位置不對，若伸入昇主動脈則影響主動脈瓣開合，左心室收縮面臨心臟後負荷的增加。此時需調整導管位置。
冠狀動脈缺氧：ARDS 病人使用 VA-ECMO，常見冠狀動脈血充氧不足，造成心臟收縮無力。
左心室漲大 LV Distention
LA 壓力增加，LA、LV 易形成血栓。會出現肺水腫及脈博壓窄等狀況。
可作 LA drainage 或 LV drainage，或作人工的 ASD 分流。
末端肢體缺血：
血栓、栓塞，甚至導管太大直接阻塞血流，皆可造成肢端缺血的問題。可重新打開傷口，置放perfusion catheter(從動脈導管側枝連接一小導管至受阻塞的遠端動脈，以恢復肢端的血流供應。一般用 16 or 18G IC)。
感染：
嚴格的無菌技術操作，儘早恢復經鼻胃管餵食，減少靜脈點滴及藥物注射。病人感染的預防原則和一般重症病人相同。
神經系統合併症：
可能出現顱內出血或癲癇現象，甚至腦死。由於病人多在”強力”鎮靜狀態，因此更須小心監測瞳孔光反射，及注意顱內壓昇高 IICP 的生命徵象反應。
呼吸系統合併症：
氣胸、血胸、壓力性氣胸、心包填塞。每天須作 CXR 及記錄吸氣最高壓力PIP。仔細評估肺部改
善狀態，調降PIP，以避免高 PIP 造成氣胸。
腎臟功能衰竭：
可能因休克造成，或病人雖已使用 ECMO 但加上自己的心輸出量仍不夠，造成器官的灌流不足。必要時可在 ECMO 系統上加 CAVH，暫時取代腎臟功能，維持體液及電解質平衡。
ECMO 警告：
先看原因(如插頭沒插好：Low AC Power；翻身或病人激動：血流量降低等)，若 ECMO 停止運作，叫 ECMO 小組及準備 CPR。血液幫浦停止運轉，可使用有手搖式幫浦(放在機器下方)，使用時按箭頭指示方向即可轉動。

path: Respiratory / NO / 九、 ECMO 呼吸器設定原則**Lung rest setting**，並配合病人狀況作調整
content:
Conventional ventilation
1. FiO2: 21~30% PIP: 15~25cm H2O PEEP: 5~8 cm H2O
2. Rate: 12~20bpm Ti: 0.5sec
HFOV Mean airway pressure: 10~14 cmH2O

<文字醫囑>
On mechanical ventilation
On CVC, A-line
On ECG, CVP level, SPO2, ABP monitor
Check vital signs, record I/O Q1H
Brain echo QD at least the first 5 days
Check GCS, pupil size and light reflex Q8H + prn till full awake
NPO with NG decompression
Wound CD QD and prn
CXR QD until condition stabilized
<Lab data>
Check CBC,BUN, Ca, creatinine, PT, APTT, QD
Check free Hb QD, keep<0.03
Check fibrinogen QD, if <160, 補 cryoprecipitate 或 fibrinogen
Check GOT/GPT, D/T bilirubin QW1,4
Check blood gas Q4H+PRN
Check PLT BID, If PLT<60K, 補 PLT
Check Hb, Ht BID, Keep Ht: 30-35, if < 30, 補 pRBC
Check ACT q2h
Blood culture QW, fungus culture PRN

path: Respiratory / NO / 十一、 ECMO Sedation - General Regimen	麻醉科 Dr.勞萱之醫師
content:
For < 3kg
Fentanyl 1 ml + dormicum 0.5 ml + atracurium 5 ml + NS 44 ml
Total volume 50 ml fentanyl (1ug/ml) dormicum (50 ug/ml) atracurium (1mg/ml)
Initial dose 以 fentanyl calculate 1ug/kg/hr; range 50-200%
but possible up to 10-15% per week
For > 3 kg
Fentanyl 2 ml + dormicum 1 ml+ atracurium 5 ml + NS 42 ml
Total volume 50ml fentanyl (2ug/ml) dormicum(100ug/ml) atracurium (1mg/ml)
Initial dose 以 fentanyl calculate 1ug/kg/hr; range 50-200%
possible titrate 10-15% per week
*不可使用 morphine*
若同時進行低溫療法，可能要降低 dormicum 用量
若預計 sedation 須超過三天，請務必每日測量 sedation scale, pupil size 及 bowel sound。
Sedation 超過五天以上很容易發生 withdrawal。不可在 weaning ECMO 後立刻關掉
sedation，需視用量時間和總量來制定計畫。

path: Respiratory / NO / 十二、 換管: Priming、及備物
content:
Pack RBC 2U
Albumin 2 bottle
Sodium bicarbonate 10ml
Vitacal 10ml
Mannitol 2ml/kg (作用: free radical scavenger)
Solumedrol 2mg/kg IV push
Ringer or Lactate ringer
✴ 若允許最好同時備有兩台 ECMO 較為安全!

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / 一、Definition
content:
Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia (BPD) was first described in 1967
NICHD/ NHLBI/ORD Workshop: The consensus was to retain the name BPD because it is clearly distinct from the multiple chronic lung diseases of later life.
Definition

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / 二、Clinical Presentation of BPD
content:
Prolongation of clinical course of RDS
Ventilator and O2 dependent
Hypercarbia, hypoxia, tachypnea, dyspnea
Reactive airway
Characteristic chest X-ray
Respiratory acidosis
Enhanced susceptibility to pulmonary infection
Clubbing finger, pulmonary hypertension, cor-pulmonale
Nutrition and growth failure

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / 三、Management
content:
Mechanical ventilation
Permissive hypercapnia, PaCO2 kept between 60-70mmHg.
Theophylline gives as respiratory stimulant during weaning in some infants.
Chest physiotherapy to prevent lung collapse.
Arrange cardiac echo evaluation if
Still under positive pressure support at 36 weeks of PMA
Presenting any signs of pulmonary hypertension: desaturation during crying, fluctuated SPO2, hard to wean O2 flow…
Nutrition
Restrict water intake 120-150ml/kg/day
Maximize calories for tissue repair and growth
Adequate calcium and phosphorus (especially if receiving furosemide)
Vitamins and trace elements
Medications
Postnatal steroids (2022 AAP recommendation)
Early (≤7 days) low-dose HC may prevent CLD or death in infants weighing less than 1000 g exposed to chorioamnionitis.
Late (>7 and <28 days of age) low-dose DEX may improve outcomes for preterm infants who remain on significant respiratory support but without evidence of severe CLD
Other medication for sBPD

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / 四、Prevention
content:
Prenatal steroid : Betamethasone
Early use of nasal CPAP
Surfactant replacement therapy
Aggressive treatment of symptomatic PDA and fluid restriction
Gentle ventilatory strategy
Aggressive nutritional support
Prophylactic supplementation of human recombinant antioxidant enzymes
Early hydrocortisone use in patients with chorioamnionitis (optional)

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / 五、Outcome
content:
Most neonates who develop BPD ultimately achieve normal lung function and thrive
Have higher risk of dying in the first year of life or developing significant long-term complications
Died primarily of pulmonary hypertension and cor pulmonale
Pulmonary function:
Increased airway resistance and reactivity, decreased lung compliance, ventilation-perfusion
mismatch and blood gas abnormalities
Abnormal pulmonary function are greatest in the first 2 years of life in infants with BPD, and survival beyond that age permits children to function at normal capacity
Cardiac function:
Cardiac failure is a major cause of morbidity and mortality in infants with BPD
Supplementation with oxygen to alleviate pulmonary hypertension has	become a mainstay of therapy
Infection : RSV, rhinovirus
Growth and neurologic development:
Growth failure (lower percentiles for height, weight and head	circumference)
Children with improving respiratory function exhibited faster catch-up growth
Sickest patients in the NICU→consequently with a significant risk of poor neurodevelopmental
outcome.(perinatal factors: PVL, IVH, sepsis)

path: Respiratory / Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia/Chronic Lung Disease / ※CLD baby 自 CPAP weaning to O2 cannula：
content:
2008/07 NICU 開始使用最新 High flow nasal cannula 產生 continuous distending pressure(有類似 CPAP 的效果)，其產生的 PEEP=2.6+0.8*flow-1.4*BW
CLD baby 戴 O2 cannula with Oxygen blender：
給予的 O2 nasal cannula flow 及實際接受到的 O2 concentration
使用方法：1. 依據 Table 1 由病嬰體重及目前使用的 O2 cannula flow 對應出一個 factor 值
2. 依據factor 值及 O2 concentration 在 Table 2 可對應出一個病嬰實際獲得的 FiO2
例：2kg 病嬰使用 100% O2 cannula 0.5 L/min。
在Table 1 對應出factor 25，再到 Table 2 對應 factor 25 & 100% O2 得到 41
→2kg 小孩使用 100% O2 cannula 0.5 L/min，實際獲得的 FiO2 是 41%
Rule of Thumb (already implicit in the tables): For most STOP-ROP infants, if flow (LPM) exceeds body weight (KG), then effective FiO2 equals nasal cannula oxygen concentration.
The tables are adapted from equations (3) and (4) in: Benaron DA & Benitz WE "Maximizing the Stability of Oxygen
Delivered Via Nasal Cannula" Arch. Pediatr. Adolesc Med 148: 294-300, March 1994

AV block

path: CV / Cardiology / 嬰兒室新生兒先天心臟病篩檢未過院內處理流程
content:
心臟病NICU/NBC病房常規
Complete ECG一定要作!! (請記得加作right side ECG，做完務必上傳)
Heart echo
第一次做請開61514 (M-mode)及61523 (color)二項；同次住院三個月內做第二次只要開61523 (color)一項；若開完刀或心導管術後仍可開二項
排heart echo，請務必開order量身長、體重stat
備註欄請註明排heart echo的原因 [記得修改快速鍵!]
入院Newborn suspected CHD
Left-to-right shunt lesions: ASD, VSD, PDA, ECD, PAPVR…
Obstructive lesions: PS, AS, coarctation of the aorta…
Cyanotic congenital heart disease: TOF, TGA, TAPVR, Ebstein’s anomaly…
History: pregnancy history, family history, perinatal history, onset time, feeding history, cyanosis, breathing patterns, growth and development
Physical examination: four limbs BP, heart sound, liver span, pulse
Order
Check CBC/DC, ABG, electrolytes, if needed: ABG,PT/aPTT,CK/CKMB/troponin-I,BNP
On ECG & SpO2 monitor
Check four limbs BP/SpO2, CXR, complete ECG, heart echo

path: CV / Cardiology / Congenital Heart Disease Overview
content:
Incidence: 1% of live-born infants
Etiology: mostly unknown, can be Chromosomal abnormality, Hereditary, Maternal drug use, Congenital Infection (rubella, CMV, herpes, HIV)
Clinical feature of CHD in the neonate：
Cyanosis, respiratory distress, heart failure, arrhythmia, heart murmur; subtle onset of signs is common, eg: prolonged, interrupted feeding, poor weight gain, tachypnea and diaphoresis
Classification:
Hyperoxia test: Determine PaO2 while the infants is on room air
Give 100% FiO2 for at least 10 minutes by mask, hood, or ETT
Obtain an ABG while the infant is breathing 100% FiO2
Cyanotic heart disease: usually unable to achieve PaO2 of >100 mmHg or the rise is usually < 10-30 mmHg after 100% oxygen

Cyanosis, little or no respiratory distress
No murmur or systolic murmur
CXR: normal or egg-shaped heart
ECG: RAD, RVH
Echocardiography: diagnosis
Treatment:
If severe hypoxia/acidosis: urgent balloon atrial septostomy (BAS)
Arterial switch operation (ASO)
TOF: VSD, RVOTO, overriding aorta, RVH
Systolic ejection murmur at LUSB
CXR: boot-shaped heart
ECG: RVH, RAD
Echocardiography: diagnosis
Hypoxic spell (blue spell, cyanotic spell, “tet” spell) management:
Knee-chest position, O2, morphine (0.2 mg/kg/dose), ketamine (2 mg/kg/dose),
propranolol po 1-2 mg/kg/day, correct acidosis
Treatment: Surgery: palliative shunt is needed, complete repair

VSD: congestive heart failure: unusual before 4 weeks
ASD: not an important cause of morbidity or mortality in infancy
ECD: systolic murmur at LLSB: resulting from AV valve insufficiency
Severe PHT: may have little or no murmur
CXR: cardiomegaly, prominent MPA, increased lung markings
ECG: LAD (superior QRS axis), RVH, RBBB
Echocardiography: diagnosis
Treatment:
CHF: digoxin, diuretics, captopril
Surgical: complete repair at 2-4 m/o
CHD is always suspected when other congenital abnormalities are present.
For duct-dependent heart disease: use PGE1 (20mcg/vial) (2025 修)
作用機制：由於內生性前列腺素可以控制周產期PDA的收縮及擴張，因此靜脈注射PGE1，可以保持PDA的擴張。
適應症：PDA dependent CHD: IAA, severe CoA, Pulmonary atresia with intact ventricular septum (PAIVS), Tricuspid atresia, TGA without VSD…
劑量：PGE1的半衰期非常短(30 min內有反應)，90%被肺部代謝，因此要持續靜脈注射
泡法：(BW x 6) μg in D10W 10 cc (1 gtt/min = 0.01 μg /kg/min) 自1 gtt/min始Recommended range: 0.01~0.1 μg/kg/min (10-100 ng /kg/min)
請儘量勿一開始就給Max dose，小心各種side effects的出現如apnea, hypotension,  jitteriness, fever等
注意事項：
Adverse effects : cutaneous vasodilatation, edema, hypotension, fever, tachycardia hypocalcemia, thrombocytopenia, jitteriness, irritation, diarrhea, hypokalemia, hyperkalemia, hyponatremia
Apnea, seizure-like,等中樞神經症狀也常見，因此有時不得已需氣管插管。

Etiology
At birth: HLHS, severe asphyxia, volume overload
Severe TR, large systemic AV fistula
At 1st wk: PDA (small preterm), TGA, HLHS, TAPVR with obstruction
Systemic AV fistula, critical AS or PS
1-4 wk: Coarctation of aorta, critical AS, Large VSD, PDA (preterm)
4 wk-4 mo: Anomalous Left Coronary Artery from the Pulmonary Artery(ALCAPA), large PDA, large VSD
Symptoms
Pulmonary signs: tachypnea, dyspnea, presence of rales and/or rhonchi
Cyanosis
Tachycardia: gallop rhythm may also be present
Cardiomegaly
Weak pulse, poor perfusion
Liver enlargement
Puffiness of eyes may be present; peripheral edema is uncommon
Diaphoresis
Decreased urine output
Exercise intolerance
Failure to thrive, feeding intolerance
Examinations
CXR: cardiomegaly, pulmonary congestion
ECG: axis deviation, chamber enlargement
Echocardiogram; anatomical defect and relationship valvular movement, functional evaluation
Treatment
Nurse the baby in sitting position 10~30° head up in the incubator
Give warm and humidified oxygen with blood gas monitoring
Control the sodium intake; low sodium milk; eg: breast milk. S-26, Similac
Fluid restriction: 70 - 100 ml/kg/day
Diuretics:
Lasix 1 mg/kg/dose. A check should be kept on the electrolytes particularly in the premature infants
Digoxin: 0.01 mg/kg/day
Prematurity 
Loading(Digitalization) : 10-20 mcg/kg IV (容易中毒，本院原則上不做)
Maintenance : 2.5 mcg/kg/dose IV q12h
Term infant: Loading  30 mcg/kg IV ; Maintenance  4 mcg/kg/dose IV q12h
1-12 m/o: Loading  35 mcg/kg IV ; Maintenance 4-5 mcg/kg/dose IV q12h
Oral doses are 20-25% higher than IV doses.
Therapeutic levels : 0.5-2 ng/mL
Adverse effects : persistent vomiting, anorexia, nausea, arrhythmias, delirium,
Toxicity enhanced by hypokalemia (diuretics, amphotericin B) or hypercalcemia

First-degree block: no necessary or specific treatment
Second-degree block: may progress to 3rd degree block, close observation, r/o digoxin intoxication, r/o pseudoblock in long QT syndrome
Third-degree block (complete AV block) r/o maternal SLE
No treatment is needed if no symptom and the rate >70 bpm
Usually needs a pacemaker if the rate is <50 bpm
Isoproterenol or a pacemaker may be necessary for symptomatic heart block

One of the most common serious dysrhythmias in the fetus and newborn
Usually idiopathic origin but may associated with WPW syndrome, cardiac malformation (eg. Ebstein’s anomaly, TGA, tricuspid atresia), or myocarditis
Mechanism: a rapid ectopic pacemaker or a circus type of re-entry secondary to different refectory periods of adjacent conducting bundles is common
Clinical manifestations:
SVT may occur in the fetus
May be asymptomatic before birth; occasionally the rapid rate may lead to in utero congestive heart failure with fetal edema or hydrops and fetal death
Newborn with SVT: symptoms and signs of low cardiac output and congestive heart failure
May be asymptomatic initially
Irritable, fussy, refusal to feed, vomiting
Tachycardia, tachypnea, hepatomegaly, skin: cyanosis, cool
ECG
Rate >220 bpm; abnormal or non-identifiable P waves
Normal QRS morphology with equal R-R interval
Management: emergency, treatment should not be delayed科共用快速鍵 “cvdrug”
Vagal stimulation
Synchronized cardioversion if cardiovascular compromise: 0.5 ~ 1 J/kg
Adenosine (6mg/2mL/vial) the drug of choice for the treatment of SVT in symptomatic infants and children dose: 0.1~0.2 mg/kg as a rapid IV bolus, max: 12 mg
Other drugs for PSVT：phenylephrine (0.01-0.1 mg/kg IV), edrophonium (0.2mg/kg IV)
Rhythm control (amiodarone) & rate control (Digoxin, β-blockers )
Rhythm control - Amiodarone
Loading dose: 5mg/kg given over 60 mins to avoid hypotension, 
could be repeated dose once
Continuous dose: initial 5 mcg/kg/min, range 5-15 mcg/kg/min
Rate control
β-blockers: limited data, oral initial: 0.5-1mg/kg/dose for 1 dose, then 1mg/kg/dose every 6-8 hours; beware of compromised contractility
Propranolol (0.01-0.1 mg/kg IV)
Digoxin: (older treatment) [見下表]

Anatomy
Clinical symptoms and signs (2021 revised)
Heart murmur: systolic or continuous murmur is heard best in the 2nd or 3rd intercostals space at the left sternal border
Hyperactive precordium
Bounding peripheral pulses and increased pulse pressure (diasytolic ductal steal)
Hypotension: decreased mean arterial blood pressure
Respiratory deterioration, increased requirements for respiratory support
Tachycardia, tachypnea, crackles, or apneic spells
Heart failure, pulmonary edema, hepatomegaly
Oliguria, acidosis
Diagnosis
Echocardiography
The most sensitive diagnostic method of a PDA.
Left atrial size/aortic root size (LA/Ao) >1.3
Increased left atrial, left ventricular dimension
Direct visualization of PDA in 2-D echogram
Radiological studies: increased interstitial fluid, pulmonary edema; enlarged heart; prominent pulmonary segment
Hemodynamically significant PDA (hsPDA)
Definition: 文獻上定義很多, 主要從四點approach
Clinical symptoms and signs: as mentioned above
Echocardiography criteria
目前以下列心超的標準(1+2+3)定義 hsPDA
Left to right shunt
Diameter/Wt > 0.15-0.2 cm/kg
La/Ao ≧ 1.3-1.5
Others: Pulsatile flow pattern, PDA/LPA > 0.5(參考)
Revised from JAMA Pediatrics 2018
CVD score: (Cardiovascular distress score) 請參考Routine-新生兒常見疾病-PDA
若CVD score ≧3分，LA/Ao ratio≧1.3，則為hsPDA，需要治療介入
BNP level: sensitivity/specificity of cutoff value:
BNP: 70 pg/mL (93% and 73%), 1110 pg/mL (100% and 95%)
Revised from JAMA Pediatrics 2018, Journal of Perinatology 2005
Treatment
限水, meet the physiologic needs; avoiding dehydration: 100-130 ml/kg/day
Maintenance of Hct > 45% with pPRBC transfusion
Maintenance of normal electrolytes
Ventilatory support: increasing PEEP: controlling pulmonary edema; keep SpO2: 91-95%, pCO2: 45-55 mmHg, pH: 7.25-7.35
Give furosemide (1 mg/kg iv every 12-24 hours for one or two doses) if there is evidence of fluid overloading or circulatory congestion
Treatment with indomethacin or a combination of indomethacin and furosemide
Indomethacin (目前醫院沒有藥)
Studies required prior to the use of indomethacin
CXR, ECG
BP in all extremities
Echocardiogram
CBC/DC, PT and PTT
BUN, Cr, urine output and urinalysis
Contraindications
Hyperbilirubinemia
BUN >30 mg/dl; serum creatinine >1.8 mg/dl
Shock, U/O <0.6 cc/kg/hr for 8 hours
Severe or ongoing intracranial hemorrhage
Necrotizing enterocolitis
Hemorrhagic disease; platelet count less than 60,000/mm3
Side-effects:
Transient acute kidney injury：必須注意使用後的尿量，若前一班8小時的尿量小於1ml/kg/hr，則使用lasix 1mg/kg/dose st，若仍無尿或有不可使用lasix的狀況，則暫hold Indocin，等尿有出來再繼續給藥
電解質失衡 (Na↓, K↑ due to fluid retention)、低血糖症、抑制血小板凝集、增加腸胃道出血及壞死性腸炎的危險
Dosage of indomethacin for hsPDA 泡法: in D5W or D10W 2cc, drip 30 mins
Ibuprofen doses (IV/PO)，IV form最高濃度 4 mg/cc, drip > 15 minutes
“Standard-dose”: 10 mg/kg/dose × 1 dose, followed by 5 mg/kg/dose Q24h × 2 doses
“High-dose”:  20 mg/kg/dose × 1 dose followed by 10 mg/kg/dose Q24h × 2 doses
Paracetamol (Acetaminophen)
Paracetamol 15mg/kg/dose q6h 3-7 days (oral)
Propacetamol 30mg/kg/dose q6h 3-7 days (IV)

Surgical ligation: 注意有無 post ligation cardiac syndrome (PLCS)，術後出現hypotension, respiratory failure 等症狀
Reference
“Randomized Pilot Study Comparing Oral Ibuprofen With  Intravenous Ibuprofen in VLBW Infants With PDA” Ahmed Cherif, MD, Pediatrics 2008
Pediatric dosage handbook with international trade names index, 16th edition, p.644
“Paracetamol treatment of PDA in preterm infants” Nadir E,J Perinatol. 2014 Oct.
Paracetamol (acetaminophen) for PDA in preterm or LBW infants.” Cochrane Database Syst Rev. 2015 Mar.
Anticipatory perioperative management for PDA surgery: Understanding PLCS CHD. 2019;14:311–316.

Amoxil® (Amoxicillin) 20mg/kg/day, bid po for chemoprophylaxis of bacterial infection
符合疾病管制局「5歲以下高危險群幼童肺炎鏈球菌疫苗接種計畫」可以開立診斷書施打免費Pneumococcal vaccination，ICD診斷碼 7590

path: CV / Cardiology / Normal range of newborn BP
content:
要注意血壓並不等於tissue perfusion，實務上如果要設定維持血壓的目標範圍，有以下方法：
Population-based normative BP (lower limit of 80% CI) (對下表1)
Clinical outcome measures (有無任何hypoperfusion sign, ex: PE, UOP, lab- ABG, lactate等)
Physiology-based definition of normal BP (以超音波輔助確認血壓不會低於critical closing pressure)(下圖2)
mean arterial pressure 大於週數3 或GA < 30 wk的抓大於30
ABP: arterial blood pressure; CBF: cerebral blood flow (此研究為 middle cerebral artery flow velocity)
Reference:
Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn, 8th edition, p.1268
Rhee CJ et al. Ontogeny of cerebrovascular critical closing pressure. Pediatr Res. 2015;78(1):71-75
Arch Dis Child Fetal Neonatal Ed. 2017 Nov;102(6):490-496
* Lack of normal range data

Shock (septic shock 請參考 Infection 章節 - sepsis)
Clinical evaluation: skin color, BP, HR, UO, capillary refilling time, (CVP)
Echocardiography: 初步評估 contractility / volume status
Lab exam: septic workup, blood gas, lactate 評估 tissue perfusion
ICON: 可提供各式 hemodynamic 相關參數, 用來區分不同種shock
ICON 使用方法
借用 ICON, 依照上圖式接上貼片: 額頭、脖子左側、左心尖、左大腿
輸入以下參數: Age, Sex, BW, BL, HR, BP, SpO2 level, Hb, (CVP)
做完之後將結果記錄到病歷, 並 key處置碼 41609

Dopamine：
作用機制：作用與劑量有關
低劑量 2-5 µg/kg/min，刺激 Dopaminergic receptor: 腎、腸系膜、腦動脈血管擴張、心跳和血壓不變，尿量可能增加
中劑量 5-10 µg/kg/min，同時刺激 β1-receptor和α-receptor心肌加強收縮，中等程度增加全身血管阻力和心臟前負荷
高劑量 10-20 µg/kg/min，α-receptor效力更明顯，全身血管阻力和心臟前負荷更顯著增加，而腎臟、腸系膜和周邊動靜脈血管收縮
若劑量>20µg/kg/min，產生的血流和力學效應類似norepinephrine
適應症：在無低容量之血流動力上有明顯之低血壓並伴隨組織血流灌注不足，少尿或神志不清狀態
劑量：如前述，泡法：BW(kg)×6 mg in D5W/D10W 10 ml, 1 ml/h r= 10 µg/kg/min
依需求調整溶液種類與濃度
注意事項：
Dopamine增加心肌做工，但不明顯增加冠狀血管血流。導致氧氣供應與需求間之不平衡，可能導致心肌缺血
高劑量Dopamine和Sodium nitroprusside結合而產生之血流動力效果，類似dobutamine
高劑量可能會導致心室上或心室心律不整
Dopamine用量應慢慢地減少，以避免急性低血壓反應
Adverse effects：ectopic heart beats, tachycardia, hypotension, hypertension, diuresis, gangrene change of extremities with high doses over prolonged periods, extravasation may cause tissue necrosis, administration of phenytoin IV to patients received dopamine may cause severe hypotension and bradycardia
Epinephrine infusion: 若血壓持續過低，可加
作用機轉
低劑量：≦0.3µg/kg/min: β-adrenergic效果，增加心肌收縮、心率和收縮壓
高劑量：> 0.3µg/kg/min: α-adrenergic效果，增加收縮壓及舒張壓、縮窄壓力差
使用時機：若非源於血管內容積下降之低血流灌注或心率遲緩皆可使用
劑量：BW(kg)×0.6 mg in N/S 10 ml, 1ml/hr=1µg/kg/min (Range: 0.05-0.3 µg/kg/min)
注意事項
半衰期短:約2分鐘，故每5分鐘需評估滴速，以達臨床需求
速率> 0.5-0.6µg/min時需注意心室心搏過速或異位性心率過速
低劑量時仍會減低腎臟及肝臟血流量
需避免Extravasation

作用機制：為合成之擬交感神經胺。藉刺激心肌內β1和α2 receptor而具有心收縮效果。它周邊α1 receptor的少許刺激，被更強而有力的β2刺激所拮抗，同時輕微之血管擴張通常亦被誘發。因心輸出量增加，周邊血管阻力反射性地下降。其直接作用在βl receptor而非藉由釋放末稍神經貯存之norepinephrine.另一方面其雖可增加心收縮亦可增加冠狀血流來平衡。
適應症：使用於治療肺充血和低心輸出量所導致組織灌注不足之患者。特別是全身血管阻力增加之病人。簡而言之，其對嚴重之心因性休克或充血性心衰竭為最恰當之選擇，尤其是心肌病變引起者。
劑量：5-20 µg/kg/min，如前述Dopamine泡法
注意事項：會引起心搏過速、心律不整、偶會噁心、頭痛，因人而異。
Milrinone (Primacor ) (10mg/10mL/amp)
Loading dose: 50μg/kg(=0.05ml/kg), run 15 minutes (稀釋最高濃度: 200μg/ml)
Maintain dose: 0.25-0.75μg/kg/min
Primacor  BW*0.6  mg in D5W/D10W 100 ml, 1ml/hr=0.1μg/kg/min

0.1 – 4 mIU/kg/min = 0.0001 – 0.004 IU/kg/min (2023年修)
BW x 0.6 U in D5W or D10W 10 ml: 1gtt/min = 1mIU/kg/min
initial run 0.1 gtt/min, range 0.1-4 gtt/min (0.1-4 mIU/kg/min)
Be cautious of vasopressin-associated hyponatremia, should monitor Na regularly
(Reference: Avery's Diseases of the Newborn, 10th ed, p. 1027, UpToDate)

Lidocaine
機制：主要由於自主性下降及第四相舒張期去極化的斜率減少，故其可壓抑心室心律不整
適應症：反覆性心室心律過速、心室顫動、或異位性心室心搏。亦可使用於經心肺復甦穩定後之心室心律不整時，尤其是懷疑心肌炎或結構性心臟病變時。
劑量：(2% 100mg/5mL amp) 20-50µg/kg/min
BW(kg)×6 mg Lidocaine in D5W 5 ml, 1ml/hr=20µg/kg/min, range 1-2.5ml/hr
注意事項：
過量會產生心肌和循環抑制。臨床上可見昏睡、方向感不明、肌肉抽動抽筋
由肝臟代謝，故如可能影響肝血流時，需降低其濃度低至20µg/kg/min以下。

2009 TPMMH : PROM+GBS Revised guideline
Neonatal Sepsis + GCSF & IVIG dose
			Septic shock management
Meningitis
Osteomyelitis
Septic Arthritis
Intravascular catheter-related infection
具抗藥性細菌的感染
Congenital Infections: Syphilis, Rubella, CMV, HSV
Neonatal Chickenpox
疑似愛滋病嬰幼兒檢驗項目
Neonatal Candidiasis, Fluconazole prophylaxis policy

path: Infection / Infection / 2009 TPMMH : PROM+GBS Revised guideline
content:
此治療指引是為了給住院醫師值班或stand by時initial evaluation and management使用，至於further的management應個別考量。
例：ELBW(<1000g) , maternal PPROM(+) & prenatal antibiotics(+), but GBS culture unknown:
Baby cannot do spinal tapping (<1000g不做)
直接給Ampicillin+Claforan meningitis dose 至少7 days，且必要時間隔24~36 hr repeat CBC 2、CRP 2 or B/C (option if indicated.)
Any symptomatic baby or mother chorioamnionitis(+)就做全套sepsis work up + full course of antibiotics (7 days or 10 days or more.)
Symptoms: respiratory distress, fever, poor activity, cyanosis, hypotension, skin mottling……
Mother without chorioamnionitis, and baby asymptomatic at birth.
備註1. PROM 指premature rupture of membrane ≧18 hrs.
備註2. PROM的病人，醫師應評估baby 有無任何症狀或其他risk ( ex: mother lab data or maternal fever) ，而決定baby是否需住院，或可僅在BR抽血
備註3. IAP: Intrapartum antibiotics，此處指針對GBS(+)的產婦給予抗生素
IAP+ 表示有IAP且已執行≧4 hrs ; 並給Ampicillin ≧2 doses
IAP- 表示無IAP或已執行未達標準(< 4 hrs或< 2 doses)。
備註4. ABX: 此處指給予GBS(-)產婦抗生素
備註5. 半套= CBC/DC + CRP + B/C ; 全套=半套+ CSF survey
ELBW (<1000g) 不做spinal tapping
若第一次的CBC、CRP data有異常，則必要時間隔24~36 hr repeat CBC 2、CRP 2、B/C (option if indicated.)，並參考臨床狀況，再決定抗生素的天數
若baby CBC或CRP有異常,醫師應評估baby有無任何症狀或其他risk ( ex: mother lab data or fever)，而決定baby是否需住院。
Abx 3d (**)通常使用ampicillin+gentamicin (usual dose) for 3 days (至少滿48 hrs), and pending culture

Incidence: 1-8 per 1000 live births
Most common etiologic agents：
Early-onset sepsis (occurring ≤ 3 days of life)：
Group B streptococcus (GBS)
E. coli.
Listeria monocytogenes
Late-onset sepsis (occurring > 3 days of life, 多為院內感染)：
Coagulase-negative Staphylococci, especially Staphylococcus epidermidis
Gram-negative bacilli, ex. E.coli, Klebsiella pneumoniae, Acinetobacter baumannii
Staphylococcus aureus
Enterococcus
Group B streptococcus (GBS)
Risk factors（Ref : Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th ed）
Premature rupture of membrane (PROM) ≥ 18 hours
Maternal peripartum infection, ex. UTI/pyuria, chorioamnionitis, HSV…
Low birth weight
Unhygienic delivery, skin care, cord care, and environments
Symptoms and signs（2018修訂，Ref : Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th ed）
Unstable temperatures, respiratory distress, poor activity, abdominal distension, poor feeding, persistent metabolic acidosis, glucose intolerance
Any subtle signs indicate that the newborns are not doing well
Laboratory examinations
CBC and D/C, CRP, blood culture, (urine routine and culture), CSF exams including routine, glucose, protein, and culture.
Latex agglutination test of urine and CSF for antigen detection prn.
Throat and rectal swab should be done when viral infection is suspected.
Sepsis score (screen positive if ≥2 points)
Treatment of sepsis
Antibiotics (Ref : Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th edition & Avery’s Neonatology 7th edition)

Low risk group/normal CSF: ampicillin + gentamicin
High risk group/abnormal CSF: ampicillin + 3rd cephalosporin (cefotaxime)
Late-onset sepsis : vancomycin + 3rd cephalosporin (ceftazidime) or meropenem
If suspected catheter related infection, consider removal as soon as possible
請於workup後立即給予抗生素，無需等待data出來，以免延誤治時機；Claforan 對LOS之致病菌大多效果不佳，勿在此時給予此藥物！

path: Infection / Infection / 由於vancomycin滴注時間較久，所以請護理師給藥先給meropenem
content:
Supportive management
Inotropic agent if hypotension
Avoid hyper- or hypothermia
Adequate fluid and electrolyte treatment
Correct coagulation abnormalities
Adjunctive management
IVIG：750 mg/kg/dose (range 500 to 900 mg/kg)  for one dose , IVD  4-6 hours
Indications:
Sepsis in very low birth weight infants
Severe sepsis in critically ill term infants
Sepsis in immunocompromised infants
G-CSF：Indication for overwhelming sepsis with neutropenia
The ANC < 500 /μl for 2 or 3 days
The ANC 501- 999 /μl for more than 5-7 days
Dose: 5-10 μg/kg/day IV or SC 1-3 times
Double volume exchange transfusion
Septic shock management (2024修)
黃金一小時 !! First hour of resuscitation - Maintain ABC + Abx
Airway + Breathing: 
先給 O2 or HFNC, 呼吸費力或嚴重低血氧考慮 mechanical ventilator or intubation
Circulation
Restore normal perfusion and blood pressure
Fluid resuscitation: Crystalloid fluid bolus 10 ml/kg, (up to 40 ml/kg)
Observing for the development of hepatomegaly and increased work of breathing
10% glucose containing isotonic IV solution run at maintenance rate to prevent hypoglycemia
Hemodynamic Support:
第一線 Dopamine, but its effect on pulmonary vascular resistance should be considered
Combination of dopamine at low dosage (< 8μg/kg/min) and dobutamine (up to 10 μg/kg/min) is initially recommended
If the patient does not adequately respond, then epinephrine (0.05–0.3μg/kg/min)
Antibiotics: 參考前面 EOS / LOS abx 選用
Empirical  therapy  should  be  re-evaluated  within  48  hours
Stabilization: beyond the first hour
Goals:
Maintain threshold HR, perfusion, BP, Scvo2 > 70%
Cardiac index > 3.3 L/min/m2, SVC flow greater than 40 mL/kg/min
Fluid resuscitation:
Hb > 12 g/dL: use Crystalloid
Hb < 12 g/dL: Packed RBCs transfusion
Diuretics are recommended in newborns who are 10% fluid overloaded and unable to attain fluid balance with native urine output/extra-renal losses.
Hemodynamic Support:
Norepinephrine can be effective for refractory hypotension, but Scvo2 should be maintained greater than 70%.
Hydrocortisone therapy can be added if the newborn has adrenal insufficiency
Refractory shock:
Must consider unrecognized morbidities (cyanotic or obstructive heart disease, critically large PDA, inborn errors of metabolism, pericardial effusion, pneumothorax, ongoing blood loss, hypoadrenalism, hypothyroidism)
ECMO

Incidence: 1:2500 live births.
Mortality rate: 30-60 %
Risk factors
Premature infants with sepsis have a much higher incidence of CNS infection.
Infant with CNS defect necessitating VP shunt procedures is at increasing risk.
Pathogens
Group B streptococcus (especially type III) and the gram-negative rods (especially E. coli) are the most common causative agents.
Other causative organisms include Listeria monocytogenes, HSV, Enterococci, Klebsiella, Enterobacter, and Serratia etc.
Clinical Presentations
Similar to those reported for sepsis.
A full or bulging fontanelle is often a late finding in meningitis.
SIADH may be seen.
Laboratory studies
Blood and CSF cultures, CSF biochemistry (WBC count, gram stain, glucose, protein), Serum glucose, electrolyte, ABG, CBC/DC, PLT, CRP
Abnormal Lab data:
Decreased CSF glucose / serum glucose (normal range: 1/2 to 2/3)
Elevated CSF protein
CSF pleocytosis (Avery10th 95%tile 19 cells/mm3, Nelson21th- upto 20 cells/mm3)
CSF antigen tests and PCR prn.
Cranial ultrasound and CT scan if indicated
Management
Supportive management and monitoring for complications
Drug therapy(Ref: Manual of Neonatal Care, 6th edition, p276)
Empirical ABx：Ampicillin (300mg/kg/day Q8H) and cefotaxime (200mg/kg/d)
Aqueous penicillin(50-60萬units/kg/day q4h-q6h, interval請按年紀對表, for 2-3 weeks) and /or + GM (for 7 days) for GBS meningitis 
(開始治療後24-48 hrs必須repeat CSF analysis，if仍pleocytosis，keep treatment for at least 3 wks, arrange brain echo for check有無hydrocephalus).
Cefotaxime(200 mg/kg/day for 2-3 weeks) for gram-negative meningitis

This is an uncommon infection in the neonatal period.
It may result from sepsis, direct inoculation in association with heel sticks and scalp electrodes, and extension from soft-tissue infections.
Pathogens：The most common organisms are Staphylococcus aureus, GBS, gram-negative bacteria, Neisseria gonorrhoeae, and Candida.
Clinical presentations
Apparent pain on motion
Localized heat, erythema and/or swelling
Apparent paralysis
Diagnosis
CBC/DC, PLT, B/C, CRP
Confirmed by Gram stain and culture of material obtained from needle aspiration of the involved bone and soft tissues
Plain-film radiographs (7-10 days later after onset for osteolytic change)
Tc-99m diphosphonate 3-phase bone scan (more sensitive)
Treatment-Antibiotics:
Avoid antibiotic before blood culture sampling (2-3 set in different sites)
Initially with oxacillin (150-200mg/kg/d) + gentamicin (or 3rd cephalosporin) (cefotaxime: 100-150mg/kg/d) until an organism is identified.
Duration: 4-6 weeks. (Parenteral antibiotics treatment: ≥ 3 weeks)
If aminoglycoside (gentamicin) is used > 7 days, please check serum level.

This may occur by direct seeding associated with bacteremia, extension of infection from adjacent bone, or following local trauma.
Etiology and clinical presentation：See Osteomyelitis
Diagnosis：Blood culture (最好2-3套增加檢出率), Gram stain and culture of material from aspiration of infected material from the joint space
Treatment
Antibiotic and duration: same as osteomyelitis.
Open surgical drainage is recommended for diagnosis and relief of pressure in some joints (e.g., hip, shoulder)
Needle aspiration may be sufficient for others (e.g., knee, wrist)

path: Infection / Infection / Guideline for the management of intravascular catheter-related infection
content:
Ref: Clinical Infectious Disease 2001;32:1249-72
Removable CVC (如一般常用PCVC, CVP, Broviac catheter)
Uncomplicated
CoNS (Coagulase-negative staphylococcus)
Remove CVC & systemic antibiotics for 5-7 days.
If CVC retained (最多容忍三次CONS infection, 之後必拔除): 
systemic antibiotic (+/-) antibiotic lock therapy for 10-14 days.
S. aureus (尤其是MRSA)
Must remove CVC & add systemic antibiotics for 14 days.
If TEE (+), extend systemic antibiotic treatment to 4-6 wks.(即表示屬complicated)
Gram-negative bacilli
Must remove CVC & add systemic antibiotic for 10-14 days
Candida spp.
Remove CVC & anti-fungal therapy for 14 days after the last positive blood culture. 
(最少2 wks, 每星期做blood fungus culture F/U)
Complicated
Complication專指septic thrombosis, endocarditis, and osteomyelitis,
必要remove CVC & systemic antibiotic for 4-6 wks, but 6-8 wks for osteomyelitis
TEE (trans-esophageal echocardiograpy) 經食道心臟超音波
Should be done for patients without contraindications, to identify those who have complicating endocarditis that requires therapy for 4-6 wks
Especially S. aureus, and Candida albican to rule out vegetations and fungal ball within heart chambers.
The ideal time to perform TEE:
if there is persistent bacteremia or fungemia
a lack of clinical improvement, especially
If it is >3 days after catheter withdrawal and
Initiation of appropriate antimicrobial therapy has not been effective.
Tunneled CVC or implantable device (ID) (如port-A, 有一段埋在皮下的導管)
Uncomplicated
CoNS
If retained CVC/ID: Systemic antibiotic & antibiotic lock therapy for 10-14 days
If clinical deterioration, persisting or relapsing bacteremia, 必定要remove CVC/ID & systemic antibiotics for 10-14 days.
S. aureus
Remove CVC/ID & systemic antibiotics for 14 days if TEE (-)
For CVC/ID salvage therapy, if TEE (-): systemic antibiotic & antibiotic lock therapy for 14 days. Remove CVC/ID & if there is clinical deterioration, persisting or relapsing bacteremia.
Gram-negative bacilli
Remove CVC/ID & systemic antibiotics for 10-14 days.
For CVC/ID salvage: systemic antibiotic & antibiotic lock therapy for 14 days. If no response, remove CVC/ID & treat with systemic antibiotics for 10-14 days
Candida spp.
Remove CVC/ID & treated with antifungal therapy for 14 days after last positive blood culture.
Antibiotic lock therapy: 將antibiotic打入導管管腔中，存留幾天或幾小時。最常見治療時間為2 wks，通常將abx 1-5 mg/ml與heparin 50-100U或N/S 混合加入管腔中約2-5 ml
Fungus, G(-), and S. aureus =>盡快拔除PCVC
CoNS最多可容忍長3次，Enterococcus最多2次，之後一定要拔除
Complicated
Tunnel infection, port abscess: 必定要remove CVC/ID & systemic antibiotics for 10-14 days.
Septic thrombosis, endocarditis, and osteomyelitis: 必定要remove CVC/ID & systemic antibiotics for 4-6 wks; 6-8 wks for osteomyelitis.

path: Infection / Infection / 具抗藥性細菌的感染 (Part 1)
content:
馬偕兒童醫院多重抗藥性細菌(MDRO)，病人隔離措施之解除 (2021 增修)
1. 病人可以出院時。
2. 傷口癒合或沒有檢體可以採檢作複檢時。
3. 無菌密閉腔室之檢體，如血液、腦脊髓液、尿液，以同部位細菌培養呈現陰性或培養出不同菌種，即可終止隔離。
4. 皮膚軟組織或外科傷口之檢體，如pus/ wound culture，以每週一次細菌培養且三次同部位培養為陰性或非MDRO時，方可終止隔離。
5. 呼吸道或支氣管分泌物之檢體，如痰液、支氣管刷洗液，以每週一次細菌培養且三次同部位培養為陰性或非MDRO時，方可終止隔離。
Reference: 馬偕兒童醫院 感染管制手冊
MRSA outbreak, and prophylactic management of colonization
Definition : Methicillin resistant staphylococcus aureus
分布：人的鼻腔可能長期存有此菌，在皮膚、咽部、呼吸道、腸胃道等處也可能存在。
傳染：照護者手部接觸傳染。工作人員遭此菌汙染的手觸摸自己的鼻腔，使MRSA存留後，再傳染給病患。尤以外科傷口、燙傷、褥瘡、氣切傷口有此菌移生(colonization)。
隔離措施
病患應儘可能住單人房，如無法住單人房時，應將有多重管路，或低體重兒，與免疫力不正常的病患分區照護。
當單位內有數位MRSA病患時，應分區隔離。安排由同一位護理人員採集中照護，且此位護理人員不能照護其他無感染MRSA的患者。
病人專屬聽診器的聽診鐘面必須每班以75%酒精棉消毒之。
當MRSA病患已控制而轉出隔離區時，病患應用Derma solution(素露)全身沐浴、洗髮後，更換衣物至新的乾淨病房或病房區。原來環境方面以100 ppm (1:500)之漂白水消毒床旁環境。
工作人員應加強洗手，且於上下班時用Hibiscrub刷手。於接觸病患前後要以Hibiscrub洗手，並隨時加強無菌技術之操作。
MRSA的治療
Systemic MRSA infection (B/C: MRSA): 應予以Vancomycin IV form.
Localized MRSA infection (ex: eye/c, wound/c. sputum/c, pus/c: MRSA): 則應針對局部給予有效藥物治療，包括Fucidin or Vancomycin topical Tx. (Vancomycin oph solution: 50mg/ml tid-qid 1 gtt ou.)。針對局部感染部位(ex: eye, wound)，於有效藥物治療7天後再做一套細菌培養，若呈現陰性，則可停止Fucidin or Vancomycin topical Tx.
註：Conjuctivitis: 若為MRSA, or Pseudomonas infection, 且有severe local inflammation現象, 則必須加上systemic Abx. treatment。若為MRSA: Vancomycin iv；若為Pseudomonas: GM or Fortum iv)。
Treat colonization patient:
針對MRSA患者及帶原者，使用Derma solution(素露)沐浴。
針對MRSA患者及帶原者，使用Mupirocin oint or Fucidin cream塗抹鼻腔、耳朵、及皮膚表面的傷口( tid-qid)。且於Mupirocin治療後，每週做一次細菌培養，必須連續三次細菌培養為陰性(即至少以Mupirocin治療13天後)，方可解除MRSA的隔離措施。(2021 增修)
Mupirocin nasal use for MRSA eradication: bid~tid for 5~14 days
ESBL (Extended Spectrum β-Lactamase)
Most common isolates : Klebsiealla spp. most common, and follow by E. coli
Klebsiella pneumoniae (75 %)
Enterobacteriaceae (腸內細菌)
ESBLs were also found in Pseudomonas, Salmonella, Proteus, and Enterobacter
ESBL bacteria 在台灣教學醫院的 Prevalence (1998-2000)：KP: 8-30 %；E. coli: 1.6-6.7 %
ESBLs with variable levels of resistance to β-lactam antibiotics. ex: penicillins, extended-spectrum cephalosporins (Cefotaxime, ceftazidime, cefuroxime, aztreonam, etc..)
ESBL-producing isolates are also frequently resistant to other kinds of antimicrobials, including aminoglycosides, quinolones and co-trimoxazole.
Resistance may not be detected by standard susceptibility test. 所以不可完全盡信傳統的sensitivity test
Risk factors for the acquisition of ESBLs
Length of stay in ICUs
Invasive procedures or surgery
Selective pressure: previous use of antibiotics：3rd-generation cephalosporins, Other β-lactams, Aminoglycosides, Co-trimoxazole
Recommendation for treatment
Carbapenems (imipenem or meropenem) should be regarded as drugs of choice for serious infections due to ESBL-producing organisms.
According to Labia et al. (1989), meropenem inactivates the β-lactamase activity to a greater extent than imipenem.
Carbapenem-resistant mutants have not yet been reported in clinical strains of K. pneumoniae.

path: Infection / Infection / 具抗藥性細菌的感染 (Part 2)
content:
Congenital Infections TORCH : T=Toxoplasma, O=Others, R=Rubella, C=CMV, H=HSV)
Syphilis (2025修)
Causative organism：Treponema pallidum (transplacental transmission)
US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) surveillance case definition for congenital syphilis*
Laboratory Studies
Nontreponemal tests:
Serum VDRL (VDRL is the only test approved for use in CSF)
Indicate disease activity, monitor response, detect reinfection and relapse
False positive: autoimmune disease, IV drug addiction, aging pregnancy, infection (hepatitis, mononucleosis, measles, endocarditis)
At least 4X higher in the infant than the mother (probable active infection)
If titer decrease in the first 8 months: probably not infected
RPR (Ab to cardiolipin): Should not be used for spinal fluid
Treponemal antibody tests:serum FTA-ABS(IgM, 本院無此項目, 需外送)、TPHA
Lumbar puncture: (Dark-field exam: spirochetes)
VDRL, Cell count, protein
Neurosyphilis: increased protein, pleocytosis, reactive CSF-VDRL test
Long bone X-ray：NB 照一張CXR，照到全身即可
Diaphyseal periostitis, osteochondritis
Wimberger’s sign: destruction of the medial portion of the proximal metaphysis of long bone, resulting in an area of irregular lucency
Fig. periosteal reaction (arrowheads), Wimgerger corner sign (arrows)
Management (2019.08, Ref: NeoReview, Avery Disease of Newborn 10th ed. Figure 38.4)
Isolation 體液、血液隔離直到治療滿24小時
Follow NTA test at 3.6.12 M/O, rising titer requires reevaluation & retreatment
Rubella  (Ref : Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th edition)
Rubella is a ssRNA virus and a member of the Togaviridae family.
Its infection is capable of causing chronic intrauterine infection and damage to the developing fetus.
Risk factors
Women in childbearing age group who are rubella-nonimmuned.
Maternal rubella infection that occurs in the period of time from 1 month before   conception through the second trimester of pregnancy may be associated with  transmission of infection.
Clinical presentations
Triad of classic congenital rubella syndrome (CRS) : cataract, CHD, SNHL
Teratogenic effects : IUGR / SGA, congenital heart disease (PDA, PA stenosis), sensorineural hearing loss (SNHL, most common isolated sequela), cataracts or   glaucoma, neonatal purpura, dermatoglyphic abnormalities
Systemic involvement : adenitis, hepatitis, hepatosplenomegaly, jaundice, anemia, decreased platelets with or without petechiae, bony lesions, encephalitis, meningitis, myocarditis, eye lesions (iridocyclitis, retinopathy), or pneumonia
The rash of rubella infection classically begins on the face and spreads caudally to the trunk and extremities. (Ref : Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th edition)
Diagnosis
Clinical presentations
Viral culture from nasopharyngeal swabs, throat swab, conjunctival scrapings, urine, blood, and CSF
CSF exam may reveal encephalitis
Serologic study: Rubella IgM and IgG
Long-bone films: may show metaphyseal linear radiolucency: “celery stalking”
Management：No specific treatment.

path: Infection / Infection / 具抗藥性細菌的感染 (Part 3)
content:
Prevention： by vaccination of the susceptible population
Cytomegalovirus(2025修) (Ref : Avery’s neonatology 7th ed, Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 11th ed, The Lancet Regional Health–Europe 40 (2024))
Cytomegalovirus (CMV) is a dsDNA virus and a member of the herpesvirus group.
CMV infection is the most common congenital virus infection.
Risk factors
Lower socioeconomic status, drug abuse, and sexual promiscuity in the mother.
Premature infants are more often affected than full-term infants.
Clinical presentations
Subclinical infection is 10 times more common than clinical illness.
Classic CMV inclusion disease is rarely seen.
It consists of IUGR, hepatosplenomegaly with jaundice, abnormal liver function tests, thrombocytopenia with or without purpura, petechiae, blueberry muffin spots, severe CNS disease including microcephaly, intracerebral calcifications (most characteristically in the subependymal periventricular area), seizure, chorioretinitis, and progressive sensorineural hearing loss(SNHL).
Diagnosis : < 21 d/o診斷即為congenital CMV, cCMV infection
Urine / saliva(after birth before breast milk feeding) virus culture
Urine/ blood/ saliva(after birth) PCR
Serologic tests : CMV IgG, IgM
Intracranial calcifications may be demonstrated by skull films, cranial ultrasonography or CT scan.
Management of cCMV
CBC/DC, PLT, BUN/Cr, GOT/GPT (follow up QD, QW1,4 & then week 1, 2, 4 according to baby’s clinical condition)
T/D.bil, serologic IgG/IgM, CMV viral load (blood or urine), LDH
CXR, Brain sonogram, CT/MRI(strongly recommended for SNHL; abnormal cranial ultrasound; symptomatic infants)
Consult ophthalmologist(fundoscopic for CMV retinitis)
Hearing assessment: ABR (Auditory Brainstem Response) test, AEP
Indications of antiviral therapy:
Viremic infants with a viral sepsis-like syndrome including pneumonitis, refractory thrombocytopenia, sight-threatening retinitis, hepatitis, and colitis
Sensorineural hearing loss, microcephaly, and other CNS manifestations
Abnormal findings under brain sonogram (e.g., LSV, cerebellar hypoplasia, ventriculomegaly)
Antiviral agents:
Treatment duration:
6 weeks: isolated hepatitis, thrombocytopenia or SNHL
6 months: CNS related symptoms(including abnormal finding under cranial ultrasound)
IV ganciclovir :
預泡：以diswater 10ml 稀釋，in N/S or D5W slow drip > 1 hr.
Max concentration: 10mg/ml.使用前後需以N/S沖，鹼性藥，小心刺激
PO valganciclovir : 
450mg/tab, 泡水in dis. water 15cc, 30mg/cc, 冰存3天
Cytotect (CMV-IVIG): 注意滴數，至少需3-5 hours drip。開始時以較小滴數run，確定無side effect後再run至設定滴數，需Q1H check BP.
Discontinuation or modification criteria:
ANC < 500/μL: Hold or adjust valganciclovir, consider G-CSF
Persistent toxicity: Adjust dose, consult Ped. Infectious Disease specialist
Rising viral load at 8 weeks: Check adherence, consider resistance testing
7. Monitoring
Multidisciplinary follow-up is essential: Ped. Infectious Disease, Audiology, Neurology, Ophthalmology, Developmental Pediatrics, and any adverse events thoroughly.

path: Infection / Infection / 具抗藥性細菌的感染 (Part 4)
content:
Monthly (Month 2–6): CBC/DC, liver function
CMV Viral Load (Quantitative PCR, real time PCR, Blood)
Audiology & Ophthalmology Follow-Up
Herpes simplex virus (Ref:  Avery’s Diseases of the Newborn 9th ed.,)
Herpes simplex infection in pregnancy
Effects: spontaneous abortion, preterm delivery, congenital infection
Transmission
Antenatal / congenital :
Five percent of all cases of neonatal HSV infection result from uterine transmission.
With primary infection, transient viremia occurs. HSV has a potential risk for hematogenous spread to the placenta and to the fetus
Hematogenous spread can produce a spectrum of findings similar to other TORCH infections, eg, microcephaly, microphthalmia, intracranial calcifications, and chorioretinitis.
Transmission rate :
Primary HSV infection - 50 %
Defined by no detectable antibody to both type 1 or 2 HSV
Non-primary first-episode infection - 33 %
Antibody to type 1, new acquisition type 2 disease and vice versa
Recurrent infection or asymptomatic shedding - 0-4 %
The mortality rate of congenital HSV infection is about 40%, and half of the survivors usually have significant problems including psychomotor retardation, seizure disorders, spasticity, and blindness or deafness.
Perinatal
Accounts for the majority(85%) of infected infants
Occurs from passage of the infant through an infected birth canal.
75 % to 90 % of infants with neonatal HSV are born to asymptomatic mothers who  have no history of HSV infection.
Postnatal : Postnatal transmission of HSV can occur through contact with infected parents or health care workers.
Antiviral Agents : Acyclovir
During pregnancy, acyclovir cross the placenta and concentrates in amniotic fluid.
Postpartum, acyclovir concentrates in breast milk.
Category C drug (to be used only if the potential benefit outweighs the risk).
Not teratogenic when given to women during the first trimester of pregnancy.
No increased rate of fetal malformations or unusual pattern of malformations
Antiviral treatment for pregnant women (oral)
Methods to Reduce Risk of Neonatal HSV Infection 
(Ref: Am Fam Physician 2002;65:1138-42)
A history of HSV infection in the woman and her sexual partner should be obtained at the first prenatal visit.
Pregnant women with no known history of HSV should be counseled about methods to avoid infection.
Condom use by the sexual partner with a history of HSV should be encouraged if the woman has no known history of HSV infection.
