急性新生兒高血氨處理

Definition: blood sugar < 40 mg/dL in a term or premature infant.
Newborn < 48 h/o: 50 mg/dL ; ≧ 48 h/o: 60 mg/dL
For permanent hypoglycemia: 70 mg/dL (Turk Pediatri Ars. 2018)
Clinical presentations:
小嬰孩和慢性病童其肝醣貯藏能力有限，且損失快速, High risk infants include: preterm, 
SGA, twins, IDM, infants of eclampsia and preeclampsia mother and critically ill infants
Differential diagnosis:
Screening and Management:
Well neonates (term or late premature, e.g. 33-36 wks) who are at risk for hypoglycemia
Monitor blood glucose level at birth + Q6H for 24h
原則：Newborn hypoglycemia 應先調整SIR，必要時應先set central line!

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / 吃的跟打的SIR請分開算！
content:
高濃度之glucose (eg.D25W or D50W)為高張力、高滲透壓，可使週遭靜脈硬化。中央靜脈所能承受之最高濃度為25%，周邊勿超過12.5%
“Asymptomatic” hypoglycemia
可餵食者：Early oral or gavage feeding with D10W or milk q 2 - 4 hours
NPO者：give IVF supplement, keep SIR: 4-6 mg/kg/min
Recheck 30mins later and adjust SIR until Dex > 60 mg/dL
Check Dex q6h until stable
Infants with "symptomatic" hypoglycemia
Monitor blood glucose level q 1 hr to q 4hr
D10W 2ml/kg  (0.2 g/kg) over 20 min, followed by an infusion of 8 mg/kg/min
Glucose infusion for maintenance provide adequate glucose infusion rate
Asphyxiated infants
Parenteral glucose administration may be through the umbilical vein (avoid a rapid bolus of conc. glucose solution and to ensure proper placement of the catheter)
When refractory to continuous SIR > 12-15 mg/kg/min, can try

0.05mg/kg IM / IV (0.025-0.3 mg/kg/dose, Max 1 mg), can repeat in 20 min PRN
Hydrocortisone (Solucortef, 100mg/via)
5mg/kg/day q8h~q12h or 1~2 mg/kg/dose q6h
(Reference: Pediatric dosage handbook with international trade names index, 16th edition, p.628)
新生兒低血糖懷疑Hyperinsulinemia處理流程
科內快速鍵#GLUCATI                                                                                      2019/07 修訂by endocrine李翊誠醫師
If Dex ≦50 mg/dL x2 次 (Ex: 發現≦50 mg/dL時立即測另一隻腳若也≦50 mg/dL)請做critical sample
STAT check serum glucose, insulin, C-peptide, blood ketone, Free T4, TSH, 
growth hormone(HGH), ACTH, cortisol, blood gas, NH3(Ammonia), lactate, pyruvate, urine and blood amino acid analysis, and urine organic acid
必要時請on A line並同時執行 << Glucagon stimulation test >>
Administer _ mg glucagon IV push (Glucagon 0.05mg/kg)
給予後請再 push N/S，以確保glucagon 確實進入患者體內
On A line for glucagon test
Glucagon IV and monitor glucose every 10 min for 40 min.
Check Dex Q3H (檢查結束後)
If Dex> 90 mg/dL, decrease IVF A mL/hr; 
請依患者體重，計算SIR增減0.5之滴數作為A
If Dex between 60-90 mg/dL, keep current IV
If Dex < 60 mg/dL, increase IVF B mL/hr; 
請依患者體重，計算SIR增減1之滴數作為B
If Dex < 50 mg/dL, gave D10W ____(2cc/kg) iv push, recheck dex 30min latter, 
if still hypoglycemia may consider add SIR 2 or more
Hypoglycemia時正常人體生理調控機轉如下：
第一步：血糖 <70 mg/dL時insulin分泌要降低
第二步：血糖 <50 mg/dL時counter-regulation hormone (cortisol/GH/glucagon) 開始分解肝醣。Glucagon首先分解肝臟肝醣，cortisol與GH逐步分解肌肉肝醣達到血糖上升之效果
第三步：體內所有醣類耗盡將轉而使用脂肪產生酮體
Hyperinsulinemia病患因為insulin過多，無法開啟低血糖調控三步曲，因此無法產生ketone。脂肪酸代謝異常之病患無法產生ketone，因此也會低血糖
Glucagon要昇糖的前提是肝臟要有足夠的肝醣。所有低血糖的疾病中也只有hyperinsulinemia 打glucagon會有效，因為insulin大量把糖份儲存在肝臟而不用。其他像肝醣儲積症(糖份亂儲存在器官無法使用)、GHD/adrenal insufficiency(無法使用肌肉肝醣)等等疾病使用glucagon不會有明顯效果，反而應該考慮使用solucortef
Criteria for diagnosis of hyperinsulinemia base on critical sample (when dex <50mg/dl):
Hyperinsulinemia (plasm insulin> 2μu/ml)
Hypofatty academia (plasma free fatty acid<1.5mmol/L)
Hypoketonemia (plasma β hydroxybutyrate<2mmol/L)
Inappropriate response to glucagon test (change in glucose >40mg/dl)
確診Hyperinsulinemia後應嘗試使用diazoxide做血糖控制
Nutritional treatment of hyperinsulinemia:
Hypertonic glucose infusion(PICC最高可承受22-25%糖水)
每25cc milk可加1g糖飴
Special formula for glycogen storage disorder
Enteral feeding (via NG of gastrostomy)
Medical treatment for hyperinsulinemia:
Diazoxide(專案藥物申請)
Initial: 10 mg/kg/day orally divided every 8 hours
Usual Maintenance:
(Neonates) 5 - 15 mg/kg/day, div. Q8H
(Infants) 5 – 20 mg/kg/day, div. Q8H
Adjust doses to achieve desired clinical and laboratory effects. If not effective within 2 to 3 weeks, then discontinue.  Ref. NeoFax: Diazoxide
副作用fluid retention, hypertrichosis, GI upset
ABCC8, KCNJ11 mutation no response to diazoxide
Glucagon 1-20μg/kg/hr IVD  副作用GI upset, crystallization in infusion set
Octreotide 5-25μg/kg/day SC  副作用NEC, Cholelithiasis
Surgical treatment:
Pancreatectomy (total, subtotal, partial) if F-DOPA scan had specific finding

97% of focal hyperinsulinemia are cured by pancreatectomy. However, as for the diffuse hyperinsulinemia, 31% were euglycemia, 20% were hyperglycemia and 49% were hypoglycemia even performed total pancreatectomy. 47% of patients who were 10-20 years of age at follow-up had diabetes or DKA.

Definition:
Glucose level > 150 mg/dL on Dextrostix
Clinically important hyperglycemia as Dex >180 to 200 mg/dL
Dex > 300~400 mg/dL may result in brain damage
Clinical presentations:
Subtle signs of sepsis (e.g. temperature instability, changes in peripheral perfusion or any changes in gastric aspirates if the infants are feeding)
Poor skin turgor, dehydration
D.D.
Excessive glucose administration
Inability to metabolize glucose: occur with prematurity or secondary to sepsis or stress
Transient neonatal diabetes mellitus
Medications: e.g. maternal use of diazoxide and theophylline
Laboratory studies:
Serum glucose level
Urine dipstick testing for glucose level
CBC/DC
Blood and urine culture
Serum electrolytes
Because hyperglycemia may cause osmotic diuresis, which may lead to electrolyte loss and dehydration
Treatment:
Treat underlying disease (如sepsis)
Decrease glucose infusion rate
Do not use a solution that has a dextrose conc. of less than 4.7%. Such a solution is hypoosmotic and could cause hemolysis, with resulting hyperkalemia.  If a glucose conc. of less than 4.7% is used, electrolytes should be added.
Insulin:  上述治療反應不佳的話才用，一般從低劑量 0.03 IU/kg/hr 開始

Definition:
Total Ca < 7mg/dL(preterm) or < 8mg/dL(term)
校正 : Ca (mg/dL) = 0.8 x (正常albumin level – 病人albumin level) + serum Ca (mg/dL)
ionized Ca < 3 ~ 4.4 mg/dl or < 0.75~1.1 mmol/L
A decrease of 1mg/dl of albumin, a decrease of 0.8mg/dl of calcium
Hypocalcemia associated with the age
Early neonatal hypocalcemia (during the first 3 days): asymptomatic
Late neonatal hypocalcemia (after the first 3 days): symptomatic
Risk factors:
Increase incidence in premature or sick neonates
infants with poor enteral intake
infants of diabetic mothers
infants stressed during the perinatal period
infants receiving blood transfusion
infants with alkalosis
infants receiving furosemide
infants receiving excessive phosphate intake
infants with insufficient magnesium intake
infants with congenital hypoparathyroidism (e.g. DiGeorge's syndrome)
Clinical presentations:
Acute hypocalcemia: apnea, irritability, slight tremors of the extremities, profound tetany, or seizures, cardiac dysfunction characterized by prolonged QT intervals and arrhythmias.
Chronic hypocalcemia: rickets characterized by apnea, bone demineralization, elevated alkaline phosphatase levels, and rib, long bone fracture.
Diagnosis:
Ca level (total and ionized form)
iCa < 3mg/dl
tCa < 6mg/dl or tCa < 7mg/dl with clinical symptoms
Serum Mg level: less than 1.5mg/dL indicate hypomagnesemia
Alkaline phosphatase level: > 225IU/L
Serum phosphate level: > 8mg/dl
EKG monitor: prolonged QT interval or arrhythmias
Treatment:
Replacement therapy
由於肌肉的電刺激，鈣離子由細胞外進入肌漿中。鈣離子包含在內質網，被快速地運用至肌節的肌蛋白纖維，來啟動肌纖維之縮短。因此鈣可增加心臟收縮功能。鈣的增加心縮功能，可藉由其對全身性血管阻力之作用而調節。在正常心臟，鈣加強心收縮力和血管收縮效果，而產生全身性動脈壓之上升。但若於心肌缺氧狀態造成能量不足下，無法將細胞質內之鈣移出，反而會造成毒性影響，另外血中游離鈣之濃度會受血中酸鹼值與血中白蛋白總量所影響。
Calcium carbonate (p.o.) or calcium gluconate (IV)
Calcium gluconate (10%, 100mg/ml, Sincal / Calglon)
適應症：hypocalcemia, hyperkalemia, hypermagnesemia, CCB劑量過高
Elemental Ca 9.3 mg/ml=0.465mEq/ml
Dosage: 1-2ml/kg/dose (速記：BW+BW  distilled water)
Slowly infuse, rate < 0.5mg/min
Calcium Chloride (2%，20mg/ml, Vitacal, 目前限麻醉科急用)
Slowly infuse, not exceeding 50-100mg/min
Dosage: 1 ml/kg (速記:BW+BW)
注意事項
重覆給藥前需確定血中游離鈣濃度，否則可能會增加致病率
給藥時需監測 HR, 注射過速會引發 bradycardia ，尤其是服用 digoxin 時
不可併用 Sodium bicarbonate，會引起沉澱，易使週遭靜脈血管硬化
給藥前要確認 IV line function 是否順, 否則可能會 extravasation of calcium, and cause skin sloughs, tissue necrosis, and subcutaneous calcium deposition endangering joint contracture
Calcinosis cutis: 形成原因不明。有時候在非輸注處也會形成。治療方式為局部塗抹 Uburn (Silver sulfadiazine)。

MgSO4 (10%, Mg2+: 16mEq/20ml, 100mg/ml)
1,000 mg of magnesium sulfate = 98.6 mg elemental magnesium = 8.12 mEq magnesium 
= 4.06 mmol magnesium
Mg <1.6 mg/dl, or seizure attack with hypomagnesemia
MgSO4 50-100mg/kg/dose over 1-2 hours, maybe repeat in 12 hours if necessary
Dilute with D5W, D10W, or N/S to a concentration of 0.5mEq/ml (建議至少1:1稀釋)
(速記：BW/2+BW/2) (2021 增修)
Bolus infusion over 1-4 hours: not exceed 1mEq/kg/hr
Prevention of metabolic bone disease in prematurities especially in the index cases of long term malnutrition or exclusively breastfeeding without fortifier
For "healthy" VLBW infants：Ca 100 mg/kg/day, P 50 mg/kg/day, Vit D 400 IU/day
For "ill” VLBW infants:
Parenteral nutrition for extended period: Ca 30 - 40 mg/kg/day, P 40mg/kg/day
Oral intake: Ca 130 mg/kg/day, P 65 mg/kg/day, Vit D 1000 IU/day

Definition:  Serum K > 5.5mEq/dl (normal potassium levels are 3.5 - 5.5mEq/dl); symptomatic hyperkalemia may begin at a serum K level >6 mEq/L.  
(Reference: Manual of Neonatal Care, 7 th edition, p279)
Clinical presentations:
EKG changes:
Early sign : tall, "tented" T waves
Late sign : wide QRS complex; wide, flat P waves, ventricular tachycardia, ventricular fibrillation or cardiac arrest
Diagnosis:
Serum K level: microelectrode method as follow-up, central blood sampling via arterial line or UAC to confirm the accurate level of serum potassium
Serum ionized and total Ca levels
Serum pH
BUN and Cr
Urine specific gravity to assess renal status
EKG monitor
Treatment:
換點滴：Shift to potassium-free IVF (D5W or D10 W)
降血鉀：Ventolin inhaler 1-2 puff q6h
保護心臟：Give Sincal for cardiac protection (VT)
Ca. gluconate (10%): 0.5mEq/kg=1ml/kg  IV over 2-4min. Be careful about bradycardia
Ventolin + Sincal可以於以下情形開始使用
BW ≤ 1000g, K ≥ 5.5 mEq/dL
BW > 1000g, K ≥ 6.5 mEq/dL
Correct acidosis: NaHCO3-2.5mg/kg (approx 3mg/kg) by slow push or rapid drip.
RI+Glucose
Indication
Any K level with EKG change due to hyperkalemia
須先確認此檢體為 central serum potassium without hemolysis 
如果有以下情形，必須立刻使用glucose plus insulin !
BW ≤ 1000g, K ≥ 6.0 mEq/dL
BW > 1000g, K ≥ 7.0 mEq/dL
RI continuous infusion
BW*100U in D10W 500 c.c., 1ml/hr=0.2 U/kg/hr
可從0.1U/kg/hr開始run, 最高可⽤到0.6 U/kg/hour以達到降低K效果(2020修)
須配合當時的體重、fluid status、glucose level、IVF、SIR及病人狀況綜合評估。
例如：BW太小or必須限水(PDA)，則可以泡得更濃一些!
若持續高血鉀→↑U/kg/hr→增加RI滴數或泡更濃之RI
每單位RI 至少與3-5g 的glucose 同時輸注，以避免低血糖。
若低血糖<60 mg/dL→↑SIR→泡更濃之糖水(主line, RI or others)或增加滴數(if tolerated)
Monitor glucose level Q1H *2 times then q6h if Dex>60 mg/dL
Ref.: The management of acute hyperkalaemia in neonates and children. Arch Dis Child. 2012;97(4):376-380
【舉例】以BW 500g之ELBW premature baby為例: if K=8.0 mEq/L。
Order開立：RI 50U in D10W 500c.c, 1ml/hr=0.2 U/kg/hr; run 0.5 ml/hr= 0.1 U/kg /hour
然後請再依其Dex、fluid status(是否須限水?)、BW之變化，靈活調整RI滴數or泡法
(RI unit數 or glucose water之concentration)!

Definition: serum Na level < 135mEq/l
Approach and D.D. of hyponatremia:
Laboratory studies
Evaluation of bedside chart
Check body weight and I/O (input/output)
Weight gain or input greater than output : dilutional hyponatremia
Urine output and specific gravity
Serum Na and osmolarity
Spot urine Na, osmolarity and specific gravity
Diagnosis of SIADH:
Low urine output
Urine osmol > serum osmol
Low serum Na and low serum osmol
High urine Na and high specific gravity
Physical examination
Note the signs of seizure activity
Volume overload: edema
Management:
Emergent measures: if seizure occur - 3% NaCl 4~6ml/kg immediately
Volume overload (dilutional hyponatremia)
Fluid restriction
Diuretic e.g. Lasix 1mg/kg
Inadequate Na intake
The maintenance Na requirement for term infants is 2 ~ 4mEq/kg/day, it is higher in premature infants.
Calculate the total Na deficit
Na≦125時必須處理，否則可能會抽筋！
（Na value desired (130~135) － Infant's Na value） X weight (kg) X 0. 6 
=____ meq，再除以(0.513) = ____ ml (if補全量)
如果（Na value desired (130~135)－ Infant's Na value）數值大於10 則用10算
通常說半量是為了避免鈉濃度上升太快，所以如果目標Na 130 一般補全量，而目標135會補半量(上升5) (請與主治醫師或學長姐確認目標濃度及補法)
建議IVD 3 hrs, then 扣IV or 打Lasix
SIADH (Syndrome of inappropriate secretion of antidiuretic hormone)
Fluid restriction 40 - 60ml/kg/day
Further investigation of underlying entities

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / Late Metabolic Acidosis
content:
Definition:
In the slowly growing premies, acidosis may occur as a result of formula feeding with a high amount of protein (esp. high casein content) or with a usual protein load.
Cause:
Disproportion between the rate of endogenous acid production and renal excretion - net positive acid balance with a decreased growth rate, rule out inborn error of metabolism and urea cycle defects and organic acid disorders
Rare seen at present after feeding whey protein dominant premature formula
Clinical presentations:
Poor feeding, weight loss, lethargy, vomiting and seizure
Treatment:
Sodium bicarbonate (2 - 4mEq/kg/day) for 1 or 2 days
Decrease protein feeding
Growth begins and acidosis resolves: Discontinue alkali supplementation

Respiratory acidosis者，應優先correct CO2 retention之情形，而非補NaHCO3
低體溫者應先保暖；newborn剛生下來體溫尚未回升、稍微acidosis時，
勿輕易補sodium bicarbonate
Correct severe metabolic acidosis, NaHCO3 0.835mEq/ml
Stat補Sodium bicarbonate (BW+BW) c.c. iv slowly push
NaHCO3(ml) = 0.6 * BW * (BE值) 再除以 (0.835)，then除以2 = _____ml
(通常我們只補半量)，以distilled water dilute一倍，IVD for 2~4 hrs，
扣IV or 打lasix

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / Infant of Diabetic mother
content:
Good control of maternal diabetes is the key factor in determining fetal outcome
Definition
Defined by maternal history, including an abnormal glucose tolerance test.
Clinical manifestation
Metabolic disorders
hypoglycemia
hypocalcemia
hypomagnesemia
Cardiorespiratory disorders
perinatal asphyxia
hyaline membrane disease or respiratory distress syndrome
transient tachypnea of the newborn
cardiomyopathy
Hematologic disorders
hyperbilirubinemia
polycythemia and hyperviscosity
renal vein thrombosis
Morphologic and functional problems
macrosomia
birth injury
congenital malformation
Diagnosis:
monitor Dex frequent as needed
serum calcium level at 6, 24 and 48 hours of age
Hct at birth and at 4 and 24 hours of age
serum bilirubin level
other test: ABG, complete blood counts, cultures
EKG and echocardiography:hypertrophic cardiomyopathy or cardiac malformation
Management:
recognition of RDS and treat
monitor blood glucose level treat asymptomatic hypoglycemia
early oral feeding to prevent hypoglycemia if no RDS
polycythemia and hypocalcemia should be diagnosed or excluded

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / Metabolic Bone Disease of Prematurity (Part 1)
content:
Definition
Decreased bone mineral content occurs mainly as a result of lack of adequate Ca and P intake in extrauterine life.
Osteopenia: evidence of decreased bone mineralization without radiological signs
Rickets: radiological evidence of bone demineralization and elevated serum ALP levels
Incidence: <1500 gm: 30%; <1000 gm: 50%; < 800 gm: 70%
Onset: postnatal age 6-7 w/o
High risk patient: GA<34 wks esp. GA<28 wks
Clinical Manifestations
A spectrum extending from overt bone disease (rickets and fracture) to mild biochemical disturbances
Fracture site: extremities – pain, loss of movement, deformity, ribs – exacerbating respiratory distress
Skeletal deformity: rib cage softening and altered head shape
Radiological grading of MBDP
Grade 0: Normal bone
Grade 1: Bone rarefaction only
Grade 2: Metaphyseal changes with subperiosteal new bone formation
Grade 3: The above changes with fractures
Late onset respiratory disease
Diagnosis
Early detection
Biweekly to bimonthly: serum Ca, P, Mg, ALP, gas
Monthly: serum Vit D levels, wrist or knee radiographs
Moderate elevations in ALP (400-800 IU/L)
Common in rapidly growing prematurity
ALP > 800 IU/L, P < 3.5mg/dl, Ca: usually remaining normal
Supplementary test: 25-OH-Vit D, 1,25-(OH)2-Vit D, PTH, urine Ca and P
Serum P concentrations showed high specificity in diagnosing MBDP.
B-ALP gave no additional information in detecting MBDP.
Combination of ALP > 900 IU/L and P < 1.8 mmol/L (5.5mg/dl)
Sensitivity 100% and specificity 70% (Acta paediatr 2000, Finland)
Radiology
X-ray: standard radiographs of the long bone or ribs
20-40% bone mineral depletion
Craniotabes
Splaying of the metaphyseal ends of the long bones
Epiphyseal cupping
Thickening wrist and/or knee
Non-traumatic palpable swelling of the costochondral junctions of the rib cage
Non-traumatic fracture of ribs and extremities
Kyphoscoliosis, bowing of the legs
Bone mineral densitometry
Single-photon absorptiomerty
Dual-energy X-ray absorptiomerty
Correlation between radiologic changes and ALP activity is poor.
Prevention
Initiate enteral feedings as early as possible.
Early nutritional care is fundamental in reducing the incidence of MBDP.
Provide Ca and P in the recommended ratio of 1.3-1.7:1.
Long term PN usage: receiving maximal amounts of Ca and P (keep at 重量比 1.3-1.7:1)
Parenteral Nutrition with sodium glycerophosphate: 使用有機磷不受鈣磷沉澱的限制，可補足新生兒骨骼發育所需之磷，以下情況可考慮使用有機磷，使用PN兩週以上且腸道營養< 30cc/kg/day或腸道手術後預期長期使用PN者 (2021 修)
Vit D: 400 IU/day
Use preterm formula or fortified human milk instead of standard formula.
Fortifier: powder fortifier is better than liquid fortifier.
Add P and/or Ca in the human milk:  oral intake 2ml/hr
Add P (2mmol/kg/day)
Relative Ca deficiency
Add Ca ( after adding P for 5 min)
Minimize the use of diuretics (esp. loop diuretics).
Switch from lasix to an anticalciuric diuretic.
Limit the use of aminophylline and dexamethasone therapy by switching to albuterol and weaning steroids as soon as medically possible.

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / Metabolic Bone Disease of Prematurity (Part 2)
content:
Use of passive range of motion to the extremities.
Treatment
The mainstay of therapy is the provision of adequate Ca and P to permit mineralization of bone.
Fractures secondary to MBDP: conservative orthopedic approach, positioning and use of simple splints with good outcome
Management of MBDP complicated by other medical conditions:
Lasix use: switch to chlorothiazide
Aminophylline and dexamethasone
Phenobarbital and hydantoin
PN associated cholestatic liver disease
Chronic renal failure
Malabsorption and fed with pregestimil
Chronic PN with MBDP
Formula feeding after discharge
Three months of an enriched formula may be adequate in maximizing bone mineral acquisition.(Arch of Disease in childhood 1996)
The most important period of skeletal mineralization occurs immediately after hospital discharge, when the infant may be developing increased Vit D sensitivity.
A persistent need for human milk fortifier in a former ELBW infant during the first 6 months of life while he was fed with expressed own mother’s milk exclusively.
Outcome
Biochemical and radiologic evidence of MBDP: little associated morbidity, seems to be self-limited
Decreased bone mineral content at 4-16 y/o
High incidence of myopia: head flattening caused by osteopenia
Affect growth and long-term skeletal structure?
Infants exhibiting osteopenia with elevated ALP have the potential for a deficit in body length by 18 months of age.
Childhood height in preterm infants is strongly influenced by genetic factors. However, biochemical evidence of metabolic bone disease during the neonatal period may have a long-term stunting effect persisting up to 12 years later, providing support for current practices that aim to prevent this condition. (J Pediatr 2000, UK)
In preterm-born children, spontaneous resolution of lumbar spinal osteopenia occurs during early childhood. (Biol Neonate 1995, Japan)

新生兒甲狀腺疾病與NB出生情況、母親病史以及用藥情況息息相關。
常見疾病包含Congenital hypothyroidism、Transient hypothyroxinemia of prematurity (THOP)、sick euthyroid syndrome、neonatal Graves
新生兒生理：正常新生兒受出生的stress、hypothermia，會出現TSH surge (2~4hrs)，然後5日後逐漸回到初始值，1個月大時TSH降到約6 mU/L，2m/o前到成人的0.5~4mU/L，但早產兒因為hypothalamic-pituitary-thyroid axis較不成熟所以TSH surge, T3, T4 level都較低
新生兒篩檢：現行newborn screen 檢測TSH(滿48~72小時後做)，如果不到24小時就做不管結果如何都得重驗 (避免TSH surge干擾)。第一次檢驗異常者需再抽TSH及 free T4做二次確認。此外，出生週數未滿34週的早產兒，如果滿28天大時還沒出院就會再增加一次新生兒篩檢採血 (開立新生兒篩檢複檢醫令661485，於備註註明TSH) ，以便及早診斷先天性甲狀腺低能症 (Congenital hypothyroidism, CH)
懷孕生理：正常懷孕過程，母親E2增加連帶造成TBG製造增加
🡪 total T4, FT4增加(relative hyperthyroidism) 
🡪 使胎兒能藉由transplacenta gradient得到足夠之FT4幫助腦部發育。任何甲狀腺疾病之母親，需將FT4控制在upper normal range，胎兒才可得到足夠供應
(2021 增)BR及NBC新生兒甲狀腺機能亢進篩檢流程圖 (2020.10 馬偕兒童內分泌科 製表)
新生兒篩檢可以把關甲狀腺低下的新生兒，此流程圖的目的為找出有甲狀腺亢進的新生兒，若懷孕母親有符合下列四項任一的定義，新生兒才需要進一步檢查，如此可以減少不必要的抽血檢驗。
重點病史詢問可以排除許多問題： (灰底者為易遺漏資訊請會診時一定要提供)
Treatment for Thyroid Disorder
Congenital hypothyroidism
A low FT4 level and TSH > 40 µU/ml are indicative of congenital hypothyroidism.
Borderline TSH levels (20-40 µU/ml) should be repeated.
Levothyroxine: initial starting dose (oral )
Premature infants 8-12 µg/kg/day；Term infants 10-15 µg/kg/day
Maintain FT4 in upper half of the normal range and TSH < 10 µU/ml
Usually given about 1/2 hour prior to feedings because it is less well absorbed with food intake
Further follow-up：F/U FT4 and TSH 2-4 weeks later after initiation of therapy to rule out the possibility of transient hypothyroidism.
Then every 1-2 months during the 1st year of life.
Two weeks after changing dosage
Every 2-3 months during the 2nd and 3rd years
In children > 3 y/o. should not exceed 4-6 months
Neonatal thyrotoxicosis
Therapy depends on the severity of the symptoms.
Mild: close observation is required. Therapy is not necessary.
Moderate:
Lugol’s solution (iodine), 1 drop q 8 h
Propylthiouracil, 10 mg/kg/day tid
Methimazole, 0.5-1 mg/kg/day tid
Severe: In addition to antithyroid medication, propranolol, 1-2 mg/kg/day bid-qid
Transient hypothyroxinemia of prematurity (THOP)
對象：小於32週早產兒(但不建議例行替32週以前小孩驗free T4/TSH)
定義：TSH < 10 μU/mL 及 free thyroxine (FT4) < 0.8 ng/dL
治療時間：6~8週時間
建議起始劑量：5 μg/kg/day
用藥後兩星期後追蹤
安排甲狀腺超音波檢查

path: Endocrine / Genetics & Endocrinology / Carnitine deficiency interpretation and supplement dose
content:
Lab data interpretation:
Carnitine Supplement Dose:
For primary carnitine deficiency: 10-20mg/kg/day in parenteral nutrition solution
May be administered by a continuous infusion dilute to 0.5~8 mg/ml in Lactated ringer solution or normal saline..
例: Carnitine10~20 mg/kg/dose QOD IV slowly push
PO (UpToDate, 2023修)
For deficiency: 50 mg/kg/day Q3-4H; titrate slowly as needed to 50-100 mg/kg/day; (up to 400 mg/kg/day) (Longo 2006; Magoulas 2012)
口服 1#(1000mg) in distilled water 10cc冰冰箱(可放3天)，再依所需劑量頻率開出
Reference: Pediatric dosage handbook with international trade names index, 16th edition, p.231
IV (Uptodate):
Initial: 2 -5 mg/kg/day in PN solution; higher doses up to 10 -20 mg/kg/day may be necessary in patients with elevated triglyceride levels or receiving parenteral nutrition longer than 7 days; free and total plasma carnitine concentrations should be monitored and doses adjusted accordingly (ASPEN [Corkins 2015])
急性新生兒高血氨處理 (快速鍵 HiNH3)
對象:
出生 ≤ 30天
血氨 ≥ 150μg/dL (1μg/dL=1.7μmol/L)
無法排除先天性代謝異常病嬰
醫囑/ STAT 檢驗檢查
ABG
CBC/DC, CRP
PT/aPTT
Na/K/Cl/Ca/Mg/P, Bun/Cr
AST/ALT, Alkaline Phosphatase, Bilirubin total/direct, Albumin
Glucose
Plasma uric acid
Plasma ammonia ** 冰浴 ** 20分鐘內有結果 **
Plasma amino acid
Plasma lactic acid
Plasma acylcarnitines
Total & free carnitines
Blood culture
EDTA 管留 2-3ml ** 輸血 & CVVH 前 **
Urinalysis
Urine organic acids (20-30ml, 收集部分檢體後可先冰存, 待集滿後再送檢)
Urine culture
CSF studies & culture (optional) 預留一管CSF 冷藏保存
Brain Ech
Management - 急性期病患處理
CVVH 醫囑快速鍵: CVVH
詳見新生兒加護病房工作指引手冊
PD 醫囑快速鍵: PD
詳見新生兒加護病房工作指引
Management - 急性期藥物劑量
Carbamyl glutamate (Carbaglu) Loading: 100mg/kg stat, 250mg/kg/day q4~6H  (每dose盡量以半顆或一顆為單位以利分藥。 藥物泡製後無法保存) 
院內無此藥，聯絡中國醫藥大學附設醫院「罕見疾病特殊營養食品暨緊急需用藥物物流中心」申請調藥，須符合特定條件及遺傳科醫師開立才能健保給付。
Sodium Phenobutyrate (Phenbuty) 250mg/kg/day q6H  (小心保存, 易潮解)，須符合特定條件及遺傳科醫師開立才能健保給付。
Vitamin B12 stat im 1pc
Carnitine 50mg/kg/day iv qD
Management - Patient Monitoring
Management - Supportive Care in the acute hyperammonemia phase

1. 前24-48小時：暫停使用含蛋白質或氨基酸之奶品及輸液
若無意識不清噁心嘔吐，可喝美強生PFD (無氨基酸配方，0.8kcal/ml)
若需靜脈營養，可特調 D (10%-20%) AA 0% PN配方 (非常規，請先電聯拜託幫忙)
可加上SMOF 2g/kg/day
2. 48小時後：可加入少量氨基酸，若無意識不清噁心嘔吐應即早餵食
TPN (0.5-1%AA); 急性期 total protein intake 1.0-1.2g/kg/day
Essential amino acid supplement 亞培 Cyclinex (0.67kcal/ml, 0.01g protein/ml)
奶量達 20ml/meal 可逐量加入母乳 (MOM) 或一般配方奶 (母乳優先)
3. Hydration: 1.2-1.5倍的維持液需求量, 輸液流速 ≥ 4ml/kg/hr
4. 每日熱量攝取目標：120-130kcal/kg/day
5. 理想血糖範圍：100-150mg/dL
維持 SIR ≥ 4 mg/kg/min, DO NOT DECREASE SIR unless Lactate ≥ 27mg/dL
高血糖：若 > 150mg/dL，可調降SIR最低到4mg/kg/min。若高血糖持續，加上RI
低血糖：增加輸液Dextrose濃度，提高 SIR
6. SMOF: 2-3g/kg/day
7. 微量元素及維他命補充:
Folinate qW
Biotin, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12, Vitamin K1 in Lyo-Povigen qW1,3,5 (in TPN)

BT 36C-36.5C
Hypertonic saline or mannitol, and hyperventilation if cerebral edema is present
Avoid Valproic acid & Steroids
If seizure: Luminal, Keppra, Dormicum

Nausea/vomiting: Primperan/Domperidon/Ondansetron
Probiotics

1. Antibiotics - 依病患臨床狀況決定; 若有接受腹膜透析或血液透析劑量需調整
2. 血液製品輸注:
血品 (PRBC, Platelet) 需洗滌
避免使用血漿製品 (Albumin, FFP)，若要使用需注意整體蛋白質攝取量需 < 1 g/kg
各血品蛋白質含量：
Albumin 25% (1ml=0.25g), FFP 7~8% (1ml=0.07g), Washed PRBC <0.5g/unit
3. 避免其他加據高血氨因子:
增加血氨生成:
Infection with urea-producing bacteria (Proteus mirabilis, E.coli, Klebsiella, Providencia rettgeri, Morganella morganii, diphtheroids, systemic mycobacterium or mycoplasma infections, herpes simplex virus infections)
Increased muscle catabolism: seizures, starvation, trauma
Iatrogenic: TPN with high protein load
GI hemorrhage
減少血氨排出: Portosystemic shunt, Ureterosigmoidostomy
藥物引起: Valproic acid, Carbamazepine, Sulfadiazine, Ribavirin, Salicylates, Glycine
Reference
Nakamura, K., Kido, J., Mitsubuchi, H., and Endo, F. Pediatrics International (2014) 56, 506-509.
Häberle, J., Boddaert, N., Burlina A. et al. Orphanet Journal of Rare Diseases 2012, 7:32
Häberle, J. Eur J Pediatr (2011) 170:21-34.
Upadhyay R., Bleck TP, Busl KM. Case Rep Med. 2016;2016:8512721

path: Medication / Medications used in the NICU / 急救藥物
content: Epinephrine (Bosmin), Sodium Bicarbonate: 詳見 Appendix 章節 - NRP

path: Medication / Medications used in the NICU / Atropine
content:
機轉：抗膽鹼藥物，經直接去迷走神經作用，加強竇房結自主性和房室傳導
適應症：有症狀的心搏過緩病人之初步治療
劑量(1mg/1mL/amp)
0.02 – 0.03 mg/kg且最低劑量為0.1mg
最高單一劑量於小孩為0.5mg，青少年為l mg，若效果不彰，5分鐘可再給一次
注意事項：
Atropine可誘發心律過速
若劑量低於0.1mg，可能會發生paradoxical bradycardia
會阻礙掉血氧不足所引發心搏遲緩之臨床觀察
高劑量：潮紅、發燒、心悸、尿滯留、便秘、顫抖、瞻妄、視力模糊、瞳孔放大
Contraindicated in thyrotoxicosis, tachycardia secondary to cardiac insufficiency, and obstructive GI diseases

path: Medication / Medications used in the NICU / Naloxone
content:
作用機轉制：純粹為narcotic(opiate)之拮抗劑
適應症：矯治narcotic poisoning所需
劑量 (0.4 mg/1mL/amp)
嬰兒- 5歲兒童(體重≦20kg)-0.l mg/kg/dose
5歲以上兒童(或體重>20kg)-2.0 mg/dose
一般劑量範圍-0.005~0.4 mg/kg
連續性靜脈滴注-0.04~0.16 mg/kg/hr
注意事項：
副作用罕見：噁心、嘔吐、心搏加速、血壓上升、抽搐及心律不整
作用時間快(<2分鐘)且持續時間約45分鐘
重複給藥之間隔可為間隔2分鐘，直到臨床效果呈現
Avoid in infants of narcotic-addicted mothers because may precipitate acute withdraw syndrome
急救復甦後之藥物 : 請參考CV章節 - CV drug
Respiratory drugs : Respiratory章節 - RDS, MAS, AOP, Pul hemorrhage, BPD, PPHN
Pulmonary Vasodilators : 請參考Respiratory章節 - PPHN
CV Drugs : 請參考CV章節 - CV drug
GI Drugs 請參考 GI-GI drug
Sedation and Analgesia  請參考 Routine-Newborn sedation
Others
Albumin (25%, 50ml/B)
用於 Hypovlemia: use 5% Albumin 0.5 to 1 g/kg/dose (10 to 20 mL/kg/dose) ≥60 min
用於 fluid / sodium restrictions (patient with hypoproteinemia and generalized edema, or nephrotic syndrome): 才考慮用 25% albumin, 25% albumin in NB with risk of IVH
Steroid
Criteria : ELBW <3 d/o, no response to high dose of Dopamine and Dobutamine, no hypovolemia
Dexamethasone (Decadron) : 0.25-0.5 mg/kg single dose or q12h for 1day
Hydrocortisone (Solu-Cortef)：1mg/kg/dose q8h-q12h for 1-5 days
(Reference: Uptodate: Hydrocortisone (systemic): Neonatal drug information)

path: Appendix1 / Appendix / Endotracheal tube 深度
content:
NTL method：NTL(=鼻中膈到耳珠)+1cm
Oral: (BW+6) cm；Nasal: (BW+7.5~8) cm
困難插管者可用光源機(現NI已買)或向開刀房第七間借內視鏡
Epinephrine 給藥方式 (2023 revised, NRP 8th edition)

作用機轉：內源性catecholamine，且同時具有α2-和β-腎上腺活性使
全身性血管阻力增加
動脈血壓，增加(收縮壓及舒張壓皆上升)
心跳增加
冠狀動脈和腦部血流增加
心肌增加收縮及氧之需求量
減少腸繫膜、腎臟、粘膜及體表皮膚之血流量
鬆弛支氣管及骨骼肌內血管平滑肌之張力
心臟自動化脈衝之增加(cardiac automaticity)
使用時機：
心跳停止跳動
心律遲緩(< 60 beats/min) 且對換氣頻率之增加或氧氣之給予無適當反應時
低血壓且對體液補充無適當反應時
劑量：For resuscitation
靜脈或骨內注射0.01– 0.03 mg/kg (0.2 mL/kg l:10,000)，每3~5分鐘一次
氣管內給藥為0.05 – 0.1mg/kg (1 mL/kg 1:10,000)
注意事項：
碳酸鈉會抑制Epinephrine之活性
高劑量會加重或惡化心肌缺氧
高劑量對原先使用Digitalis治療的病人，可能誘發或惡化心室期外收縮+

作用機轉：與氫離子反應形成水和二氧化碳，可緩衝代謝性酸中毒，相對於它的使用會產生高CO2(每50mEq可達260~280mmHg)。由於Bicarbonate進入細胞緩慢，而CO2進入細胞內則非常迅速，會引起反彈式加重細胞內 高碳酸血症及酸中毒。
適應症：急救時並非第一線藥；僅用於當已有進一步且妥善的處理後，例如氣管內管放置並給予100% O2的換氣，有效地胸部壓迫法等。
其他適應症：severe metabolic acidosis, certain intoxication (salicylates and phenothiazines), renal tubular acidosis, hyperkalemia
劑量：(7% 20 mL＝16.7mEq/amp＝0.835 mEq/mL)
開始應以1-2 meq/kg IV slowly > 2 min
Subsequent doses：Wt(kg)×0.6×BE÷0.835=___ml，最大量的一半乃是其後給予之劑量，且不應以快過10分鐘給予(快速給予會造成IVH)，通常是半量2-4小時補完
注意事項：
反彈性細胞內高碳酸血症會減弱心肌收縮
高血鈉引起水份之滯留、高滲透壓
Bicarbonate會使氧紅血素飽和曲線左移，而抑制氧釋放到組織中
血清內鉀離子往細胞內移動，加重低血鉀症
加強鈣和血清白蛋白之結合，而減少血清內游離鈣之濃度
bicarbonate不能和Ca 混和 → 會沉澱

大小神水 ENT李國森主任 (快速鍵: “GODWATER” ) 2021 revised
大神水 for bleeding，如肺出血
2% Xylocaine : 1/1000 Bosmin (原汁) = 3:1 
（例如: 2% Xylocaine 3cc + Bosmin 1cc）
使用時不論體重，NICU/PICU皆用0.3ml/dose打進endo
小神水 for spasm，如支氣管攣縮
2% Xylocaine : 1/1000 Bosmin (原汁) = 200:1 
（例如: 2%Xylocaine 20cc + Bosmin 0.1cc）
使用時不論體重，NICU/PICU皆用0.3-0.5ml/dose打進endo
困難插管者可用光源機(現NI已買)或向開刀房第七間借內視鏡

content:
1. Metronidazole(SABS): WHO: Avoid breastfeeding
2. Vancomycin: Micromedex Lactation Rating: Infant risk cannot be ruled out
BR routine (2024 revised)
BR R3工作內容
Check Newborn (詳細PE)，開入院order、寫BR病歷
診斷摘要與出院摘要之診斷需一致（須蓋章）
值班on call看NB時完成紅單（理學檢查），未完成病歷歸為當月BR R3
病歷表內每一項都要有寫字
Check出院 (務必確認是否有heart murmur/clavicle fracture/oral ulcer)，開出院order
針對newborn異常處做解釋，包括解釋echo報告、用O2不room in、有murmur
收住院病⼈ (jaundice, respiratory distress…etc.)
處理在BR的lab data (dex, CBC/CRP…etc.) monitor有用vacuum出生的baby HC
每⽇須回覆產房or刀房standby的會診單
⽉底需報 image conference
簽床規則
從嬰兒室辦住院：打電話跟NBC/NI訂床後開入院許可證，在與住院組交辦事項處輸入床號 (BR黃疸收當天on call VS，喘或其他照NBC/NI簽床本簽)
直入NI or NBC的先確認是否有會診VS，若無則上去後依照NI/NBC簽床本簽
現在BR case住院全面電子簽床，步驟如下：
步驟1：先打電話建檔（週一至週五白天請NBC批價人員協助；週六日或批價人員無上班 16:00前通知分機 3247、16:00後通知分機 2031），告知批價人員: 
(1)媽媽的病歷號  (2)Baby的病歷號 (3)性別 (4)出生年月日 (5)多胞胎胎次
步驟2：完成建檔後，於住院醫令系統開立住院許可證：住院醫令
→輸入「母親」病歷號碼進入醫囑畫面→其他→(限產科)病嬰住院許可證
→指定VS、主診斷、是否藥物過敏、床位種類，與住院組交辦事項處輸床號
→按「儲存至SOAP」→按「全部完成」→最後確認畫面選擇護理站印表機
步驟3：將列印出來的A5大小的住院單，請家屬帶至住院中心或急診辦理住院
常⾒NB問題
Maternal GDM/SGA/LGA/preterm：check dex Q6H一天或幾次皆可
若dex太低可開喝糖水order (不需開D20W回)，可1 hour後recheck dex
喘：太喘經評估可以改入NBC/NI 或用O2，hold room in
聽起來pulmonary secretion多的可以請BR阿姨幫忙suction
台北BR on O2 hood要開結構式醫令; 開立方式為：住院醫令→治療/處置→輸入處置代碼「999170」→儲存→產生醫令並點擊全部完成。DC O2 時需DC結構式醫令。
Hold room in 情況：用O2, GA<37 weeks, birth weight<2500gm, isolation care
Maternal GBS or PROM(+) w/o complete IAP：check CBC/DC, stCRP, B/C
有cephalohematoma或有用vacuum，可monitor HC 
範圍太⼤沒有改善可建議家屬做自費brain echo並要在出院前做完
以下 BR fever 處理流程、DDH處置流程、媽媽甲狀腺疾病（詳見Endocrine章節）

path: Appendix1 / Appendix / DDH 處置標準
content:
＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿
好發因子: 臀位產、家族病史、產前羊水過少、多胞胎、子宮內壓迫徵象(斜頸、足踝變形、膝反曲、大腿姿勢不對稱)
身體診察: Barlow test, Ortolani test, Galeazzi test, 大腿外展受限
DDH SDM: (BR) 所有新生兒皆需開立，(NBC) 請注意若於BR開過勿重複開立
髖關節超音波篩檢代碼: (自費) 61147，(健保) 61153

產房call：告知NI / NBC leader先備床→來得及可以上去NI拿急救箱，自備聽診器→從BR通道過去或從產房⾨口入皆可。要換隔離衣及戴口罩、髮帽、換鞋
刀房call：告知NI/NBC leader先備床→NI拿急救箱及所需用物。⼩於28週（或特殊狀況）之standby請找NB fellow/ NI nurse一起去→進⼑房前換開刀服/髮帽/鞋套/口罩
Standby流程
進入產房/刀房standby，穩定寶寶狀況後決定去向，評Apgar score
視動向打電話向NI or NBC leader訂床（同時告知寶寶狀況）
跟媽媽及婦產科醫師說明狀況及去向
轉送病人 （需住院則請⼀位家屬陪同辦理住院手續）
請開立住院後根據病人週數和急救狀況 key診斷碼 (快速鍵 SB)
Elementary (馬偕碼41228)：出生週數33+0-36+6週 或 出生體重1501-2500克 或 任何經婦產科醫師評估為高危險妊娠生產
General    (馬偕碼41229)：出生週數29+0-32+6週 或 出生體重1001-1500克 或 Apgar score一分鐘≦5或五分鐘≦7
Advance    (馬偕碼41230)：出生週數<29週 或 出生體重≦1000克 或 Apgar score一分鐘≦3或五分鐘≦5
Check list
Ref: Henry's Clinical Diagnosis and Management by Laboratory Methods, 23th ed, e24-e26

Neonatal stroke 2025新增
Classification (clinical-anatomic subtypes)
Arterial ischemic stroke
Hemorrhagic stroke
Cerebral sinovenous thrombosis (CSVT)
Periventricular venous infarction (PVI)
Clinical presentations: Encephalopathy, seizure, abnormal tone, focal neurologic deficits, respiratory impairments(apnea), and feeding problems
Diagnosis
Define lesion
Cranial doppler sonogram, brain CT
MRI (greater sensitivity and specificity)
DWI may underestimate full extent of infarction: first 24 h and after day 5
T2 & T2 FLAIR more reliable than DWI at day 7 and later in term newborns
Neurovascular imaging: MRA, MRV
Investigate underlying cause
CBC/DC, PLT, CRP, B/C, ABG, blood group, BUN/Cr, GOT/GPT, CK/CKMB, dextrose, PT/APTT, D-dimmer, Fibrinogen, FDP
Collage /EPI closure time
Factor XIII Activity (自費)
Von Willebrand factor (vWF Activity)
Anti-Thrombin III (AT-III), Protein-C/S test
Echocardiogram: detect structural heart disease with right- to-left shunt
Management
Supportive care
Adequate oxygenation and ventilation
Correct dehydration and anemia
Monitor and correct metabolic disturbances(acidosis, hypoglycemia, hypocalcemia, and electrolyte disorders)
Antiseizure medications
Prevent further injury
In acute CSVT: consider anticoagulation with unfractionated heparin or LMWH
For intracerebral hemorrhage:
Correction of markedly low platelet counts
Replacement of deficient coagulation factors for neonates with coagulation factor deficiency
Ventricular drainage or shunting for hydrocephalus

Vein of Galen aneurysmal malformation (VGAM) 2025新增
Classification
Primary
choroidal type:Multiple feeders, including: thalamoperforating, choroidal and pericallosal arteries are located in the subarachnoid space in the choroidal fissure
mural type:Fistulae in the subarachnoid space in the wall of the median prosencephalic vein
Secondary:Parenchymal Arteriovenous Malformations
Clinical presentations:
The greater the size, the larger the degree of shunting through the lesion, and the earlier the presentation.
CV : high-output cardiac failure, pulmonary hypertension, and  multiorgan system failure
Neuro: Cyanosis, hemorrhagic lesions, hydrocephalus, cerebral atrophy,impaired cortical development
Diagnosis
Prenatal screening ultrasound or with the fetal MRI
Cranial doppler sonogram
Brain CT with
MRI
Investigate for severity of  heart failure
Echocardiogram
Renal and liver function test
EEG
Management
The main therapy goal is to minimize congestive heart failure
Bicêtre score
< 8 points：No treatment (recent studies showed this group receiving embolization may still have good outcome)
8-12 points：Emergent embolization
>12 points：Embolization at 5 months of age with continue management
Embolization：the main approach to treatment and can be performed by an arterial transarterial approach using liquid adhesive agents or micro coils or by a transvenous approach typically using the umbilical or femoral veins.
Microsurgery： not a primary treatment, but may still be performed  for  persistent hydrocephalus, intracranial bleeds, hematomas, or when embolization fails
